faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

menu planning

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good in all aspects.

review_content.Placements: Our course has fewer students. The highest salary offered is Rs. 30,000 per month. The average salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 18,000 per month. Almost 99% of students got internships in different companies like Max Healthcare Labs, etc. The top recruiting company is Max Healthcare Labs. The top role offered is a senior lab technician.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not much good. Labs are average. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. We don't have a canteen. They don't provide sports facilities. Classrooms are clean and well-maintained. The library is not much spacious.

reviews_list.review_title: IPSM provides a lot of courses but only some of them are useful.

Prestigious labs and much more is available. All the students get internships at several places. Lab technician, radiology technician, etc. roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was quite well developed in a small place. Classes are small but fully developed. Wi-Fi is available inside the institute. Hostel is not available. Students may apply for PGs nearby the institute.
review_content.Faculty: Semester exams are normal, they are not too difficult. Teachers are well qualified and have proper knowledge of each subject. Teaching quality is very good and understanding the topics is very simple. The course is curriculum relevant.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with our college because of its good placements and good teachers.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary offered in our course is Rs. 40000 per month, the average is Rs. 20000 per month, and the lowest is Rs. 10000 per month. Recruiting companies are mainly private-sector labs and private hospitals. Around 90% of students got internships in many hospitals and diagonistic labs.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many labs, Wi-Fi, and a library. There is no canteen, but there are many shops around the college where students go and eat whatever they like. There are many parks. There is a playground.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. Their teaching quality is amazing. Exams are moderate and the passing percentage is 35%. This course is in demand and it has lots of scopes.

admission_process.title: Institute of Paramedical Science and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Institute of Paramedical Science and Management admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Institute of Paramedical Science and Managementoffers courses at UG and Certificate levels. Some of the courses include UG Diploma and Certificate. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 64,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 1 year - 2 years. Certificate courses are offered for 6 months.

RUHS Dental Science College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Cutoff, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 exam date has been set as May 2, 2026 (tentatively) for RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur admission to the MDS course. The registrations for the same are expected to start soon.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG stage, courses available include BDS. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like MDS. RUHS Dental Science College fee structure ranges between INR 47,850 to 64,420.

faqs.answer: A:    RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur has been rated 2 on placements.
faqs.question: Does RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG stage, courses available include BDS. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like MDS. RUHS Dental Science College fee structure ranges between INR 47,850 to 64,420.

faqs.answer: A:    The RUHS College of Dental Science cutoff 2024 is released for the candidates seeking admission to BDS course. As per the cutoff released, getting a percentile of more than 70 is crucial to get an admission. Candidates must score the minimum score a percentile of 50 in each of the subject to qualify NEET exam and get eligible for admission.The required rank to get eligible for the RUHS College of Dental Science is 8934 (BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery) for the General AI category candidates. Anybody who scores less than the minimum cutoff will not be able to get admission to RUHS College of Dental Science. Check out cutoff for different AI quotas for BDS course in 2024:CourseGeneralOBCSCSTPWDEWSBDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery893419805142333156454121054731023
faqs.question: Why do you need to score more than 70 Percentile in NEET to get into an RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur?

faqs.answer: A:    RUHS College of Dental Science NEET UG Cutoff was released for different categories under the AI and the HS quota. As per the cutoff list, the cutoff rank for the General AI category to get BDS was 14991. Therefore, the chances of getting BDS with this score is low if one belong to the General AI category. However, for the OBC AI catdegpry candidates, it is possible to get BDS admission with this score, as the cutoff rank for this category is 22122.
faqs.question: What are my chances of getting BDS at RUHS College of Dental Science with an AIR of 15000 in NEET UG?

faqs.answer: A:    RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur offers Degree courses including 1 UG and 7 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur has specializations such as MDS specializations in Oral Pathology , Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, Orthodontics , Periodontology, Prosthodontics.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur?

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It has poor infrastructure and the worst faculty members. It leaves you jobless.

review_content.Placements: Only 5% of the students get placement. The salary package offered depends on the sector, whether it is a private setup or a government job. Jobs are few in this field, i.e., dentistry, and only a few students get government jobs. The salary package offered is quite low, and it is not more than the salary that ranges from Rs. 10,000-15,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite old and not up to the mark. There are fans and lights which do not work. The washrooms are in very bad condition. For repair of damages and other materials we require for study and practicals, we have to contribute money and get it done. In the hostel, rooms are the worst with no facilities, and repairs have to be done with our own money. In the first year, it makes you stay in one common room for 25 students, and it is very congested. The food served is the worst, and sometimes there is no food available.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: A student's insight to a dental college.

review_content.Placements: RUHS college of dental is a government dental college. No medical or dental college provides any recruitments just after the undergraduation. After graduation students appear for post graduate entrance examination. Students can also appear for other exams conducted at different times to get a job.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has lecture theatre where classes are held. Hospital has 10 departments with dental chairs in every department. Infrastructure is not so good. You can see broken dental chairs which are almost never repaired inspite of being a government college and a large amount of funds allotted.

overview_faqs.question: Is RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur is a well-known institution for BDS, MDS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur has a rating of 2.7 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3 on campuslife, 2 on placements, 3.3 on faculty and 1.7 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur.

content.Placements: Very few students get placements after passing and even if they get placed, the salary package offered is too low. Internships are provided at the college level only and interns are provided with stipends. But the externs there don't get stipends instead they have to pay some amount to get an internship done in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is too old and poor. There is a lack of basic facilities. There are no canteen facilities and other basic things. Hostel doesn't have much capacity to accommodate all students. There is no water cooler for the hostelite. Air-conditioning in a few of the lecture theatres is also poor.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has poor infrastructure and the worst faculty members. It leaves you jobless.

content.Placements: Only 5% of the students get placement. The salary package offered depends on the sector, whether it is a private setup or a government job. Jobs are few in this field, i.e., dentistry, and only a few students get government jobs. The salary package offered is quite low, and it is not more than the salary that ranges from Rs. 10,000-15,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite old and not up to the mark. There are fans and lights which do not work. The washrooms are in very bad condition. For repair of damages and other materials we require for study and practicals, we have to contribute money and get it done. In the hostel, rooms are the worst with no facilities, and repairs have to be done with our own money. In the first year, it makes you stay in one common room for 25 students, and it is very congested. The food served is the worst, and sometimes there is no food available.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: A student's insight to a dental college.

content.Placements: RUHS college of dental is a government dental college. No medical or dental college provides any recruitments just after the undergraduation. After graduation students appear for post graduate entrance examination. Students can also appear for other exams conducted at different times to get a job.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has lecture theatre where classes are held. Hospital has 10 departments with dental chairs in every department. Infrastructure is not so good. You can see broken dental chairs which are almost never repaired inspite of being a government college and a large amount of funds allotted.

faqs.question: Why do you need to score more than 70 Percentile in NEET to get into an RUHS College of Dental Science, Jaipur?

Candidates must score the minimum score a percentile of 50 in each of the subject to qualify NEET exam and get eligible for admission.The required rank to get eligible for theRUHS College of Dental Scienceis8934(BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery)for the General AI category candidates. Anybody who scores less than the minimum cutoff will not be able to get admission toRUHS College of Dental Science. faqs.question: What are my chances of getting BDS at RUHS College of Dental Science with an AIR of 15000 in NEET UG?
faqs.answer: RUHS College of Dental Science NEET UG Cutoff was released for different categories under the AI and the HS quota. As per the cutoff list, the cutoff rank for the General AI category to get BDS was14991. Therefore, the chances of getting BDS with this score is low if one belong to the General AI category. However, for the OBC AI catdegpry candidates, it is possible to get BDS admission with this score, as the cutoff rank for this category is22122.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Narayan Medical College and Hospital:

faqs.answer: A:    Narayan Medical College and Hospital is a well-known institution for MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Narayan Medical College and Hospital has course specializations in Anaesthesia, Biochemistry, Dermatology, General Medicine, Microbiology, Pediatrics, Pathology, Pharmacology, Physiology, Radiology, Anatomy, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Ophthalmology, ENT, General Surgery, Orthopaedics.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Narayan Medical College and Hospital?

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It provides good teachers, exposure. But there is miserable outdated infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our course depend mostly upon interviews and entrance, and it does not make much difference. For clearing an interview students to need vast knowledge and experience, and this depends on how a college manages academics and gives students first-hand experience by directly allowing them to face patients. This is why patient flow is one of the most important factors students need to analyse before selecting a medical college. In this aspect, our college has satisfactory patient flow, and teachers are also highly experienced, and knowledgeable.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Perfect place to enter medical fraternity

review_content.Placements: I'm currently pursuing my MBBS, batch 2020-2021. There are a total 150 students in the batch, the MBBS guidelines by NMC don't exactly leave it upto the college's choices to teach the students. Gaining internship is not a hard deal in the course. It's just about the zeal and respect in pupils about the colleagues, teachers, juniors. The college makes you capable enough to live a royal life afterwards. It even offers certain post graduate programs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is not as old as many other institutes. But the rate of its progress is surely much better. The infrastru imrpovement takes place annually, feedbacks and reactions are apt. WiFi is provided in Libraries, Classrooms and libraries are fully air conditioned. Food in the mess, canteen, cafeteria, food court, and other fod corners is perfect. The best part is every place it whole heartedly open to suggestions and criticism.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: If you have an option to go somewhere else, then do not come here. The campus rules are strict.

content.Placements: Most of the students passing from here are placed as there is a scarcity of doctors during COVID times. Students are working in AIIMS state hospitals and other reputed private hospitals. Most of them choose to take a break from work and prepare for PG examinations.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is not available here. The food served in a mess is average. Hostels are crowded. Sports facilities are very less. The library is good. Some classrooms or lecture theatres do not have an air-conditioned facility. Overall, it is not worth the money we pay here. Labs have adequate apparatus, but they are not up to the mark.

reviews_list.review_title: Academics are good. There is adequate clinical exposure.

review_content.Placements: My batch strength comprises 100 students. My course is MBBS. In the first year, three subjects are taught; in the second year, four subjects; in the third year, three subjects; and in the final year, four major subjects and the rest minor subjects are taught. The total duration of the course is 4.5 years.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our lecture theatres, air conditioners are available. Professors teach us mostly via projector. A 24-hour Wi-Fi facility is available. There are well-equipped labs in various departments like physiology, biochemistry, histology, pathology, microbiology, and FMT. One canteen is present. There are three mess halls in the girls' hostel and three in the boys' hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with good faculty members and environment.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not required in this course. MBBS is an independent course that treats other people. Companies don't visit our college to recruit students. Students have to do internships in their final year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not good. Wi-Fi is provided in our college. Classrooms don't have mics. Library is not available for 1st-year students. Food served in the hostel is good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are helpful, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. Their teaching quality is average. The course curriculum is relevant, and it makes students ready for the industry. Semester exams are difficult to pass. The pass percentage is 60-65%.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for MBBS.

review_content.Placements: Almost 95% of students got placed in our college. The average salary package offered is 8 LPA. Our college provides courses like MBBS, GNM, nursing, and paramedical. review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities like hostels, classrooms, labs, a library, etc. The food served in the mess is good. Labs are fully equipped with all basic equipment, machines, and medicines. Many tournaments and fests are held in our college.

content.Placements: In this course, no placements occur. Students do a one-year compulsory internship along with the course, for which they are paid Rs. 27,000 per month. cut_off.college_name: Nalanda Medical College Hospital Cutoff 2025: Check NEET UG Round Wise Ranks

description: Nalanda Medical College Hospital cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Nalanda Medical College Hospital NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 22629 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Nalanda Medical College Hospital MBBS cutoff 2025 was 22629 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 10537 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Nalanda Medical College Hospital accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Nalanda Medical College Hospital NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 12914 to 148982. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MS and MD, respectively. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Nalanda Medical College Hospital MS cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MS in Obstetrtics and Gynaecology. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 12914.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

The Round 1 of Bihar NEET UG cutoff 2025 for MBBS admission is 10177 for the General HS category. Among the OBC category students, the Round 1 cutoff rank for the same course is 10208 in 2025, which has comparatively less difficult cutoff for admission. For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the provided filters to view the cutoff ranks.

Labs are fully equipped with all basic equipment, machines, and medicines. Many tournaments and fests are held in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, a canteen, a hostel, a sports ground, etc. The infrastructure of the hostel is not good. They won't provide a hostel for the first-year students. The food served in the hostel is available. Our college has a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied because of the best faculty members and value for money.
reviews.review_text: The only thing I do not like here is its infrastructure. Facilities are also not good here. Wi-Fi is not available everywhere. Labs are good but not too attractive. Classrooms are not provided with microphones. The library is not available for first-year students. The hostel is not available for first-year students. Sometimes, even 2nd-year students do not get hostels. The mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Patna.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The laboratory is good. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are well-maintained. There is a decent library in this college. A drinking water facility is available in our hostels. There are 3 boys' hostels and 2 girls' hostels. The hostel facility is not available for the 1st year boys. The hostel rooms are equipped with air-conditioners.

reviews.review_heading: A review of our college, NMCH.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities of our college are quite nice. There is no high-speed Wi-Fi available in our campus. Labs are well maintained. Classrooms are quite large, neat, and clean. Library is also good. The hostel food is good. Sports ground is not so large.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college. Our college is good in terms of academics.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like air-conditioned classrooms, free Wi-Fi, a well-maintained library, etc. Our college building is old but well-maintained. It gives aesthetic vibes. Our college is under CCTV surveillance. The hostel is well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the best college.
reviews.review_text:
The hostel is quite good in our college. In first year, we get common room, and then we are provided with double rooms, followed by single room. The hostels are not provided with Wi-Fi.
Ee have library facilities which have Wi-Fi. The food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the 2nd best medical college in Bihar.
reviews.review_text: It is one of the oldest colleges in Bihar. This college was established in the year 1969-70. The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is available. Hostel facilities are below average. The food quality is good. Canteen is available. Medical facilities are also available. There is a playground on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college was established 50 years ago. Our college has various things. Wi-Fi facility is available in the library, which is very useful for students who want to study online through Youtube or attend online lectures. Many playgrounds are open in our college. Our college is pleasing. It has a good study environment for sincere students who want to become successful and outstanding doctors to save our nation and help needy people.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college academics.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are not good. The infrastructure of our course is not good. Wi-Fi is not good on campus. Labs are a bit good. Classrooms are not well-managed. The air conditioners are not working well. There is no mike in our college. The library is good but not available for night study. The hostel is not good enough. It is not properly managed. The mess is good, but the canteen is not much good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has excellent infrastructure. Medical facilities are available. There is a huge hospital that offers all types of surgery and diagnostics. The hostel is neat and clean. The quality of the food is very delicious and healthy. Our college has a gigantic library with all types of medical books.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Every year, almost 30 students are placed in our course. The course fee is Rs. 80,000 per year. We can get jobs in reputed hospitals in India and abroad. We can start our clinics after completing this course. We can do PG after completing this course.
content.Infrastructure: Three libraries are available. Anatomy and physiology labs are available. Classrooms are available. The hostel facility is good. The quality of the food is good. The college atmosphere is pleasant.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful. The teaching quality is good. The course is difficult. There are three internal exams per year. Exams are held once per year. Our university is KUHS. Semester exams are difficult.

reviews_list.review_title: Review Written by a Nilratanite

review_content.Placements: Students of every year have a paid internship program after the final year exam, earning around 30k-40k per month during the internship. After completing the internship and receiving their registration number, students are able to become house staff in hospitals. Every single student passing the final year professional exam will get the internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The departments are well-equipped, and the laboratories are coordinated for various diagnostic work. The library is well-equipped with plenty of books, and borrowing books from the library is easy and swift. The canteen offers pocket-friendly prices with good food, and the departments are well-planned for coordination with others.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best medical colleges in West Bengal.

review_content.Placements: Placement is the same as any government college in West Bengal under WBUHS. You get around 30k during an internship per month, and this goes up to 40k if you can do a housestaffship after completing your MBBS degree. During MD/MS, you can get 60k and above depending on your branch, be it medicine or surgery, and that will depend upon your NEET PG/NEXT rank.
review_content.Infrastructure: Since it is a government hospital, infrastructure is not as good as in private hospitals, but everything necessary to become a good doctor is available. Specially there are dedicated buildings for most of the departments, which are only present in the top 4-5 medical colleges in West Bengal. There is a football field present with a floodlight, and it is the biggest ground in any government medical college. Also, in view of cultural activities, there are cultural festivals held every year and cultural events going on throughout the year.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: NRS saviour of poor India .

review_content.Placements: As there is nothing like placement in case of MBBS or medical related course, but there is internship which is compulsory for everyone and you will get approximately 28k and house stuffship after passing out MBBS you may or may not join it salary is avg to GD but it's hard to get as it depends on your professional exam results.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library and theory classrooms are well developed. Practical equipments are also good but these colleges are still following the old school technical machines and equipments so some new developed machines are not present for practical but it's enough for studies. NRS have a playground of its own.

overview_faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Nil Ratan Sircar Medical College and Hospital is approximately INR 36000 - INR 40500.

overview_faqs.question: Is Nil Ratan Sircar Medical College and Hospital a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Nil Ratan Sircar Medical College and Hospital is a renowned institution offering M.Sc, PG Diploma, GNM, B.Sc, B.Sc. (Post Basic), MD, MS, DM, M.Ch, MBBS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Nil Ratan Sircar Medical College and Hospital boasts an impressive review rating of 4.6 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4.5 for Campus Life, 4.58 for Placements, 4.58 for Faculty, and 4.33 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Nil Ratan Sircar Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: We have a secure future with 100 percent placement. We get respect from people for being a doctor.

content.Placements: 100 percent of students are placed. Package is not by company; we are given a government job and license for practice. The government is recruiting us. All students get internships. Our course offers us to be a doctor. We have a very secure future as we get a stipend of 32,000 per month. After completing 1 year of internship, we get house staff, which gives us around 55 thousand per month. So we have a secure life.
content.Infrastructure: We get awesome facilities and infrastructure in our college. We have advanced labs. We have a modern classroom with a projector and smart board. We have Wi-Fi availability and a charging point. Our hostel is also awesome. We have coolers for cans and clean water. We have a big playground in front of the hostel where intercollegiate cricket and football are held. We have a separate badminton court also. Our hostel also has a carrom board for cars. Our mess is highly hygienic. Mess provides us with a lot of variety of delicious and tasty food. Our college is a hospital, so medical facilities are extremely advanced.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A review of Nil Ratan Sircar Medical College And Hospital.

content.Placements: Most students opt for higher studies after their MBBS, taking the NEET PG or INICET exams to study MD or MS. Otherwise, you can work as a housestaff in the same or another college. The college provides internships to all students in its associated hospital, with a monthly stipend of Rs 30000.
content.Infrastructure: There are over 10 different buildings housing the different departments. The labs in every department are well equipped as well as well furnished and mordernized. We also have a central library covering an area of 4000 square meters, which can hold over 400 students at a time. Every room is fully air conditioned. Apart from these, we have a playground, a couple of badminton courts, a table tennis room and many more places where we can refresh ourselves as well as practice our hobbies. We also have a beautiful lake, which helps us rejuvenate ourselves after a hectic day. The hostel is well furnished with every necessity of its inmates. It has 2 elevators, 2 washing machines per floor and a gym room. We can also use any electrical appliances, like induction ovens, hair straightners and many more. The food here is pretty decent, with a variety of options.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review Written by a Nilratanite

content.Placements: Students of every year have a paid internship program after the final year exam, earning around 30k-40k per month during the internship. After completing the internship and receiving their registration number, students are able to become house staff in hospitals. Every single student passing the final year professional exam will get the internship.
content.Infrastructure: The departments are well-equipped, and the laboratories are coordinated for various diagnostic work. The library is well-equipped with plenty of books, and borrowing books from the library is easy and swift. The canteen offers pocket-friendly prices with good food, and the departments are well-planned for coordination with others.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: One of the best medical colleges in West Bengal.

content.Placements: Placement is the same as any government college in West Bengal under WBUHS. You get around 30k during an internship per month, and this goes up to 40k if you can do a housestaffship after completing your MBBS degree. During MD/MS, you can get 60k and above depending on your branch, be it medicine or surgery, and that will depend upon your NEET PG/NEXT rank.
content.Infrastructure: Since it is a government hospital, infrastructure is not as good as in private hospitals, but everything necessary to become a good doctor is available. Specially there are dedicated buildings for most of the departments, which are only present in the top 4-5 medical colleges in West Bengal. There is a football field present with a floodlight, and it is the biggest ground in any government medical college. Also, in view of cultural activities, there are cultural festivals held every year and cultural events going on throughout the year.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: NRS saviour of poor India .

content.Placements: As there is nothing like placement in case of MBBS or medical related course, but there is internship which is compulsory for everyone and you will get approximately 28k and house stuffship after passing out MBBS you may or may not join it salary is avg to GD but it's hard to get as it depends on your professional exam results.
content.Infrastructure: Library and theory classrooms are well developed. Practical equipments are also good but these colleges are still following the old school technical machines and equipments so some new developed machines are not present for practical but it's enough for studies. NRS have a playground of its own.

reviews.review_text: Our college has the best infrastructure with a huge area and a huge boundary. Our lecture theatres are large. Our practical classes are done with a lot of concentration. If you get enough good marks in NEET and can hold a good rank, then this college is for you.

There is an adequate number of labs for every paraclinical subject, well-equipped wards for practical demonstration and a huge playground for inter-college sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members and infrastructure of the college.

Central library facility is also provided for free of cost, and low-cost canteen facility is available along with hostel canteen.

college_info.intro:
Eminent College of Pharmaceutical Technology's popular programmes are BPharma and DPharma. BPharma and DPharma students are placed in top companies such as Sun Pharma, Macleds, Cipla, Lupin Diagnostics, AMRI Hospitals, Fresenius Kabi, and others. The college provides quality education to the students under the guidance of experts. Overall, Eminent College of Pharmaceutical Technology is one of the best colleges offering education to students.
After completing their education at the Eminent College of Pharmaceutical Technology, students can become Pharmacists, Drug Inspectors, Medical Underwriters, Food Inspectors, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Eminent College of Pharmaceutical Technology and their respective eligibility and Eminent College Of Pharmaceutical Technology fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    Eminent College Of Pharmaceutical Technology admission are based on JEE Main/ WBJEE exam score for the BPharma programme. Aspirants applying for BPharma at ECPT can appear for JEE Main/ WBJEE. Candidates applying for admission should pass Class 12 examination with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics as the subjects with minimum of 45% aggregate (average) in the above subjects (40% for SC/ST/PWD/OBC) and have to qualify in West Bengal Joint Entrance Examination (WBJEE) or Joint Entrance Examination, (JEE Main). The admission of the candidates would be as per guidelines of MAKAUT & PCI.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our campus is green and faculty members are helpful.

review_content.Placements: Our seniors pass out with good marks and many students are placed in companies like Alkem, Mankind, Torrent Pharma, Glenmark Pharmaceuticals, Lupin, etc. This is our first batch and our placement record is impressive. There is a placement cell in our college. Teachers are very active in placements. Around 90% of students are placed at reputed companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is very good. Everything is available in the laboratory that a pharma laboratory required. Our college has Wi-Fi and smart classrooms for effective study. Several books are available in the library. Many magazines and newspapers in both English and Bengali are available like The Hindu, The Telegraph, etc. The hostel is average but Wi-Fi is available all time. The canteen serves quality food at a decent price. Mess is available. All medical facilities are available. There is a playground on campus, and many students play football after their studies. There is a common room for indoor games like carrom and table tennis.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a great college, and it encouraged me to build my career.

review_content.Placements: It is a growing college, and we are the first batch and will be passed out in 2022. Our college had put various efforts to guide and help us to get placed in renowned companies. Our college has hired a placement officer to train us on various professional skills. Our college has also arranged industrial visits to provide us with industrial exposure. Overall, it is a great thing to start our career.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a free Wi-Fi facility all around the campus, along with well-equipped laboratories, digital classrooms and common rooms for both boys and girls. Our college also has gymnastic for boys and a well-furnished library which contains various magazines, guides, books, references, newspapers and a lot more. There are also hostel facilities for both boys and girls very near to our college building. The canteen in our college is good, and they maintain hygiene in its surroundings with healthy food. There is a huge playground inside the campus, and our college organises inter-college sports week every year in January.

review_summary.college_name: Eminent College Of Pharmaceutical Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: All teachers in our college are accommodating and highly qualified. Hence, the college is good.

content.Placements: Our seniors passed out with good GPAs, and many students were placed in companies like Sun Pharma and Torrance Pharma. Our first batch was released in 2022, and the placement record was impressive. The second batch was released in June 2023. There was an active placement cell in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college was excellent and continuously developing. The laboratory was well-equipped with facilities like a pharma chemistry lab and a pharma microbiology lab. The college had Wi-Fi and smart classrooms for practical study. Various pharmacy books were available in the library. The hostel was available on the college campus. The centennial served quality food at a reasonable price. The campus was green, and there was a playground.

college_info.college_name: VBSPU Jaunpur: Courses, Admission 2025, Fees, Scholarship, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary: Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University admissions 2025-26 are open for Diploma, UG, and PG courses. Interested candidates can check and apply for their desired course through the official university website. A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University offers specialisations in its flagship courses, which are MBA and BTech. Apart from JEE Main and PUCAT, the University shortlists candidates based on the exam rankings of the UPSEE/UPTU exam for admission to BTech. The fee for BTech reaches around INR 40k - 60k (annually). The annual fees for an MBA course sum up to INR 50K (per semester).
For an MBA, candidates must graduate with 45% marks at the graduation level. Apart from the graduation marks, the University considers UPSEE results as a mode of admission.
The University offers UG, PG, PhD, and PG Diplomas in various programmes distributed across the fields of Engineering, Commerce, Medicine, Management, Science and Law. VBSPU offers 1000+ courses through 6 different departments, catering to every course and its specialisation separately. The candidates can seek programs in BTech from the UNS Institute of Engineering and Technology. For specialisation in MBA, VBSPU has a Faculty of Management Studies. For more details regarding the VBSPU programs, check out the table given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: VBSPU offers at least 1000+ courses through all the affiliated colleges combined. The eligibility to become part of all these courses involves an aggregate of a minimum of 45% marks, along with the entrance exams such as CUET-UG/PG and PUCAT. Courses such as BTech take up 70% of seats through JEE Mains, while the remaining 30% of seats get filled through PUCAT. In terms of MBA course fees, a 2-year program can gross up to, INR 1.1 lakh, whereas, a 4-year course such as BTech costs up to INR 2.5 lakh.

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee is 500 for General/OBC and 250 for SC/ST.
faqs.question: What is the application fee for M.Tech at VBSPU Jaunpur?

faqs.answer: A:    After considering all the specialisations, around 50%-70% of seats are allocated to the candidates who qualify the accepted entrances such as PUCAT, and JEE Main. For UG and PG courses, the CUET exam scores are taken into consideration for admission to fill 50% of seats. For courses such as BTech, JEE Main’s scores are considered to allocate 70% of seats, and the remaining 30% are allocated via the PUCAT exam. Some courses such as BCA and diplomas require the PUCAT exam after the qualification of 10+2.
faqs.question: Can I get into VBSPU without taking the PUCAT exam?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee structure of VBSPU varies from INR 14,450 to INR 3.2 Lacs depending on the programme and its duration. The provision to pay semester-wise and/or annually is available for the students. The total expense also involves one-time fees and several other charges availed during the admissions. The entire bifurcation of the fee structure involves tuition fees, books/stationary, hostel fees, security deposits, and a few more amenities that a student avails of during the entire period of academia.
faqs.question: How costly is VBSPU?

faqs.answer: A:    Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University offers more than 25 courses at UG, PG, and Diploma levels in full-time mode. These programmes are offered under six faculties, admission to some of the courses is based on the university-conducted entrance exam and for remaining courses are through national-level entrance exams, such as JEE Main, UPCET, etc. Tabulated below is the list of some of the popular courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:CourseEligibility & Selection CriteriaBPharmaEligibility: Bachelor's degree with a minimum of 45% to 50% aggregate Selection: UPCET/ PUCAT + CounsellingBPharmaEligibility: Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregateSelection: UPCETBScEligibility: Class 12 in the Science stream with 45% aggregateSelection: UPCETMScEligibility: Bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate Selection: PUCATBCAEligibility: Class 12 in any streamSelection: PUCAT

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University.

review_content.Placements: No placement is available in this course, in case of placement it's useless. Internships are available but at a very low level minimum 10 to 20%, and not all students every year get internships. MS internship is obtained by students in areas like accountant, data entry, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, not bad. It is well developed but it's developed more as other colleges in this city. Library, computer lab, seminar hall, and classes are available in the building. Now canteen is closed, but other facilities are available in the department.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: V. B. S. P. U, Jaunpur, IBM review.

review_content.Placements: No placement is available in this course because it's just a graduation, I think. But I didn't see any person in my course getting a placement. Internships are available, but not for every student and at the same percentage. Sometimes, some people get internships, but it's very low, with a maximum of 10 or 15% students getting internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good, not well developed, but developed in my course building, IBM. Computer labs are available. The library and classroom are available, and each floor has neat and clean washrooms. Medical facilities are available, and a canteen is also available. The sports ground is available.

overview_faqs.question: Is BTech CSE available at VBSPU?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, the university offers a full-time Bachelor of Technology (BTech) in Computer Science Engineering course. The duration of the course is four years. Admission to the BTech CSE course is entrance exam-based. review_summary.college_name: VBSPU Jaunpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University [VBSPU].

content.Placements: No placement available, zero percent of placement available. Internships are available, but not very active. Approximately 5 or 10 percent of students got internships in this course, maybe just because it is a graduation degree. Most internships are in accounting, data entry, and the HR sector.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. All facilities are available on this campus. It's a main campus with a library, a cool water facility, clean washrooms, seminar halls, a computer lab, a medical room, and classrooms, all available in the IBM building. Sports grounds are also available, and food is acceptable.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University, Jaunpur Review.

content.Placements: Placements are not available, but internships are available; however, not every year and not for all students. It's just 10 or 15 percent of internships available, and if we talk about placement percentage, it's zero, especially in this course. Most of the roles in internships were in accounts, data analysis, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. All facilities are available on the campus. It's the main campus, and good quality food is provided by the mess. In the department, the library, computer lab, seminar halls, water cooler, medical room, and classes are available. Sports grounds are also available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University.

content.Placements: No placement is available in this course, in case of placement it's useless. Internships are available but at a very low level minimum 10 to 20%, and not all students every year get internships. MS internship is obtained by students in areas like accountant, data entry, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, not bad. It is well developed but it's developed more as other colleges in this city. Library, computer lab, seminar hall, and classes are available in the building. Now canteen is closed, but other facilities are available in the department.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: V. B. S. P. U, Jaunpur, IBM review.

content.Placements: No placement is available in this course because it's just a graduation, I think. But I didn't see any person in my course getting a placement. Internships are available, but not for every student and at the same percentage. Sometimes, some people get internships, but it's very low, with a maximum of 10 or 15% students getting internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good, not well developed, but developed in my course building, IBM. Computer labs are available. The library and classroom are available, and each floor has neat and clean washrooms. Medical facilities are available, and a canteen is also available. The sports ground is available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: V. B. S. P. U. Jaunpur review.

content.Placements: No placement is available in this college. In case of placement, I will rate this college zero only for this course. I am not talking about all courses. I never see anyone in my course get placement in any companies. Internships are available, but not in huge numbers, only about 5 or 10 percent.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good, and all types of facilities are available on my campus. In my building, we have a library, cold water facility, clean washrooms, seminar halls, computer lab, and classrooms. Hostels are good, and the food is bearable, not so bad but not so good.

admission_overview.title: VBSPU Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Purvanchal University offers more than 25 courses at UG, PG, and diploma levels in full-time mode. These programmes are offered under six faculty, admission to some of the courses is based on the university-conducted entrance exam, namely the Purvanchal University Combined Admission Test, admission to remaining courses are conducted through national-level entrance exams, including JEE Main, UPCET, etc. The university follows a common application process for all the courses. Interested and eligible candidates are required to register on the official website of VBSPU in online mode to seek admission. Reservation of seats is as per the UP State Government/ University norms. A relaxation of 5% aggregate in the qualifying degree exam is applicable for SC/ST candidates across all the courses. The University also reserves the right to admit University Employee wards as per VBSPU rules.

admission_process.title: VBSPU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: VBSPU offers three UG courses: BPharma, BTech and BSc. The university offers MSc, MTech, MCA, MA and PG Diploma at PG level. VBSPU admissions to most of the courses are primarily entrance-based. The table below shows the eligibility, selection criteria and total tuition fee:
1 - VBSPU Application Process
Visit the official website.
Complete the application form.
Pay the application fee - specified on the website.
Submit the filled form before the notified deadline.
2 - Course-wise Selection Process
VBSPU conducts its own entrance examination for certain courses. These exams are VBSPUET or other entrance tests for speicific programs.
For some courses, VBSPU also accepts scores of national-level entrance exams like JEE, NEET, or others.
After resukts of above mentioned exams are released, VBSPU notifies a merit list. The list is published on the website.
3 - Counselling & Admission Confirmation
Shortlisted candidates will be invited to appear for the counseling process.
Candidates must bring original documents for verification.
After document verification and seat allotment, candidates must pay the course fee to confirm admission.

courses_data.name: VBSPU BPharma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University (VBSPU)offersBachelor of Pharmacy (BPharma)course of a four-year duration. The course is divided into eight semesters, and the mode of education is full-time. The university also gives a three-year Lateral Entry BPharma course. students can apply for BPharma admission online, and the university provides entrance exam-based admission to BPharma and Lateral Entry BPharma courses.

faqs.question: What is the basic eligibility for BPharma at VBSPU?
faqs.answer: The VBSPU BPharma admission criteria require students to have completed Class 12 in Science. They also should have scored a minimum of 50% marks. Both PCB and PCM students are accepted. CUET is compulsory for admissions.

faqs.question: What is the application process for the BPharma programme at VBSPU?
faqs.answer: VBSPU BPharma course applications are available on the official website. First, register for the course, the fill out the application form. After that, upload scanned copies and pay the application fees. The application fee is INR 250 – 500.

faqs.question: How costly is VBSPU?
faqs.answer: The fee structure of VBSPU varies fromINR 14,450toINR 3.2 Lacsdepending on the programme and its duration. The provision to pay semester-wise and/or annually is available for the students. The total expense also involves one-time fees and several other charges availed during the admissions. The entire bifurcation of the fee structure involves tuition fees, books/stationary, hostel fees, security deposits, and a few more amenities that a student avails of during the entire period of academia.

courses_data.name: VBSPU PhD Admission 2025
courses_data.description: For PhD admission at VBSPU,students need tofill the application form provided by the university. The form includes personal details, educational qualifications, research interests, etc. Selection is basis PUCRET conducted by the university. The eligibility for the program ismaster degree with minimum 55% marks, national level fellowships or relevant work experience. Admission process includes entrance test and interview.

faqs.question: What is the counseling and document verification process in Ph.D. admissions at VBSPU?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have made it to the short list of VBSPU PhD programme are invited for counselling and a document check. Candidates may be required to present their original certificates, grade reports, and other required papers throughout this procedure for verification. Additionally, choosing a research manual and talking about the study topic of interest are both steps in the counselling process.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to the PhD programme at VBSPU?
faqs.answer: Candidates must have a master's degree with a minimum GPA of 55% in order to be eligible for admission to the Ph.D. programme at VBSPU. Candidates with appropriate work experience or national-level fellowships may also qualify. In most cases, the entrance exam (PUCRET) and the interview make up the admissions procedure. Consult the official VBSPU website for the most up-to-date and comprehensive details on the available Ph.D. programmes and entrance criteria.

faqs.question: Is PhD available at VBSPU?
faqs.answer: VBSPU PhD course eligibility requirements include a master's degree with at least 55% marks. Those who have national-level fellowships and work experience may also be eligible to apply. The admissions are based on PUCRET exam scores. More information is present on the official website.

faqs.question: Can I get into VBSPU without taking the PUCAT exam?
faqs.answer: After considering all the specialisations, around50%-70% of seatsare allocated to the candidates who qualify the accepted entrances such as PUCAT, and JEE Main. For UG and PG courses, theCUET examscores are taken into consideration for admission to fill 50% of seats. For courses such asBTech, JEE Main’sscores are considered to allocate 70% of seats, and the remaining30%are allocated via thePUCATexam. Some courses such as BCA and diplomas require the PUCAT exam after thequalification of 10+2.

IPS officers ensure public safety by supervising the police agencies of states and Union Territories.
IFS officers are responsible for maintaining good international relationships with other countries on behalf of India.
SSC officers are responsible for the different operational tasks of the organisation including compiling files, reports, and all the ongoing cases.
Research Associates plans, organizes, and conducts research for various market topics including the financial market.
CDS officers are responsible for supervising all three defense forces of India, the Military, the Navy, and the Air Force.
Indian Air Force officers are responsible for protecting the country against all aerial threats.
Bank POs are responsible for supervising the clerical staff. Apart from that, their key role includes managing cash flows, loans, and mortgages.
Social workers are responsible for improving the lives of the people they are taking care of and helping them find solutions to their problems.

faqs.question: Does VBSPU offer any placement support?
faqs.answer: The VBSPU ‘Rozgar Mela’ or the job fair is the University’s secondary support to provide placement support. Besides this facility, the University’s primary support is to make sure to prepare the students sufficiently enough to achieve a job based on their skill set. The University helps the students prepare for the interviews and gives job-specific training providing them with a more practical approach to the work ahead.

description: VBSPU Jaunpur cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about VBSPU Jaunpur UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The VBSPU Jaunpur cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the VBSPU Jaunpur BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 547431 and 1411305 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering. The first round cutoff rank fo

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 547431 for the general HS quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 514307 in 2023 and 337198 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated an improving trend.

Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University [VBSPU] accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to VBSPU Jaunpur can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

VBSPU Jaunpur admissions to PG courses has concluded with the release of Round 3 seat allotment results. The CUET PG cutoff has been released only for MCA course in 2024 for General and PWD HS categories. As per the VBSPU Jaunpur cutoff 2024, the first round cutoff rank for MCA course stood at 16718 for the General AI quota. Check out Shivaji University First and Last Round rank for the same course from the table below:

The CUET PG admissions have been closed now with the release of last round cutoff release. VBSPU Jaunpur CUET PG cutoff 2024 was released for admission to Master of Computer Applications (MCA). The last round closing score for MCA, for the General Home State category candidates, was 15433. In 2023 and 2022, the last round closing scores for MCA were closed at 18013 and 15093, respectively. Looking at the cutoff ranks for the past three years, the cutoff showed a declining trend. Checkout the cat

CUET PG cutoff is the minimum mark applicants need to secure to get admission in college/university. The participating universities will release a particular subject's CUET PG 2024 cut-off separately. Check out the structured schedule for CUET PG for 2025 from the table below:

As the VBSPU Jaunpur UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at VBSPU Jaunpur.

library.description:
Central Library is one of the largest repositories of information in Uttar Pradesh to provide quality services to its students, research scholars, teachers and staffs. It is s  three storied impressive modern library building with the name of Vivekanand Central Library.  In 2016, the Central Library has been awarded as a “Centre of Excellence” by Govt. of Uttar Pradesh. The Library premises are under CCTV surveillance to control unethical incidents. Library has Wi Fi connectivity to provide Internet as well as e-Resource facilities to its users even after closing the library.
Now the Library is working with SOUL software package for its in-house job like circulation, serial control, cataloguing, OPAC/Web OPAC etc.
The present Library stock comprises 1,12,006 books, 318 professional Indian and foreign journals and magazines, 557 back volumes of journals, 10211 Ph.D. theses, 760 CD, 12 Newspapers, 216 Govt. publications, press clippings since 2008. Library has a reach collection of reference books like, encyclopedia, dictionary, yearbook, atlas, directory, almanacs etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University [VBSPU].
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. All facilities are available on this campus. It's a main campus with a library, a cool water facility, clean washrooms, seminar halls, a computer lab, a medical room, and classrooms, all available in the IBM building. Sports grounds are also available, and food is acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University, Jaunpur Review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. All facilities are available on the campus. It's the main campus, and good quality food is provided by the mess. In the department, the library, computer lab, seminar halls, water cooler, medical room, and classes are available. Sports grounds are also available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, not bad. It is well developed but it's developed more as other colleges in this city. Library, computer lab, seminar hall, and classes are available in the building. Now canteen is closed, but other facilities are available in the department.

reviews.review_heading: V. B. S. P. U, Jaunpur, IBM review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, not well developed, but developed in my course building, IBM. Computer labs are available. The library and classroom are available, and each floor has neat and clean washrooms. Medical facilities are available, and a canteen is also available. The sports ground is available.

reviews.review_heading: V. B. S. P. U. Jaunpur review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, and all types of facilities are available on my campus. In my building, we have a library, cold water facility, clean washrooms, seminar halls, computer lab, and classrooms. Hostels are good, and the food is bearable, not so bad but not so good.

reviews.review_heading: V. B. S. P. U Jaunpur B.Com (H) review
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. In the department, we have a library, cold water facility, clean washrooms, seminar halls, computer lab, and classes. Hostels are good, well secured, and have good food facility. Ambulance is always available outside the hostel just for safety.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Microtek College of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 31 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I want to improve the way they provide practical knowledge in greatly way.
reviews.review_text: 60 percent of the students were placed in the course. In my college, packages were above average. Highest salary totally depends on the students. If the performance of students good, they get the highest package. Top recruiting companies were Amazon, etc. Students got internships. Placement and training activities were held on regular basis.

reviews.review_heading: Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University Jaunpur (B.Teach).
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The library and labs are available in good condition. Every needed thing is available for students. Canteen food is also good. They also have a separate playground and different buildings for labs and classes. Overall, good infrastructure at all.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Technical Education and Research Institute (TERI, Ghazipur)
reviews.review_heading: It is good for low budget students as well as looking for scholarship opportunity.
reviews.review_text: Everything is fine and available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, conference hall, playground, park, etc. There is a hostel but none of the students stay there and take a PG or room near the college. Canteen is there. Medical facilities are there. Sports and games can be played on the ground attached to the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Sant Kinaram MahavidyalayReviewed on 6 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Very good college and college's condition is best.
reviews.review_text: Good. Campus infrastructure is well-maintained with good Wi-Fi connectivity, air-conditioned classrooms, a fully equipped library, and modern labs. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms and proper security. Food in the mess is hygienic and affordable. Sports facilities like basketball and cricket grounds are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is excellent and the infrastructure is decent, but placements could improve.
reviews.review_text: Our college's infrastructure is good, and our labs are very good, with all facilities provided to students. However, the classes are not maintained perfectly. Overall, everything is fine in our college because the library is very nice for learning peacefully and with full focus. Our canteen and hostels are also very structured and clean.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Maa Saraswati MahavidyalayaReviewed on 19 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: The institute offers excellent infrastructure with smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, a modern library, and secure, comfortable hostel facilities. The college provides cleanliness, 24/7 Wi-Fi, and safety measures, making it ideal for focused learning and living. Welcome.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Dashrath SansthanReviewed on 12 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is excellent. Big airy rooms with CCTV cameras, fans and good light. There is no hostel because it is in a very rural area. There is no mess, no canteen for students. There are basic medical facilities available here. There is a big sports ground for Volleyball, Football, and many small games.

reviews.review_heading: If you are in Jaunpur so it's best universities in Jaunpur.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure and facilities in our department. We have library, conference hall, computer lab, and water facilities. They provide study material and at university I think all the facilities are available including games and extracurricular activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Shibli National CollegeReviewed on 21 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best thing about our college is that it has a good environment for studying.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good, and the hostel is also very good. The food is good, and a lot of attention is paid to cleanliness. The girls’ hostel looks very clean, the environment is pleasant, and the security is top class.

college_info.college_name: VBSPU Jaunpur Scholarship Details

paragraphs: VBSPU Jaunpur offers two types of scholarships to students. The university offers a Post-Matric Scholarship to students. The Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University provides financial assistance to the relatives of Kargil Martyrs and the victims of natural disasters (Tsunami victims). The Post-Matric Scholarship is for the candidates whose parents/guardians' total income doesn't exceed INR 2 lakh for Backward Caste, General, Minorities, and INR 2.5 lakh for SC/ST category candidates.

Government Medical College and Hospital, Baramati MBBS cutoff 2025 was 26497 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 27005 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

reviews.review_heading: Best college very good hostels.
reviews.review_text: GMC Medical College of Baramati has Wi-Fi labs, a classroom library and very good infrastructure. They are very cool. The quality of the hostel is very good mess and canteen are private but the taste of the food is mind blowing and every facility is available nearby.

reviews.review_heading: GMC BARAMATI: ray of hope for medicos.
reviews.review_text: Best infrastructure in all over medical colleges in Maharashtra. Hospital college and hostels are having best infrastructure along with adequate ventilation. The library of 2 floors is available in our college. Skill lab is being developed to practice on mannequin. Canteen and mess both are in campus so no need to go out for food. Small playground is there.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides top-notch facilities. The grounds are not available currently. But in the future, they will be available. The food quality is good in most medical colleges. You can either join in the mess or have a tiffin delivered to your room. They don't cost extra charges.

reviews.review_heading: In our college campus placement in cleaning and social life and gurden.
reviews.review_text: In our college often take Sesolna Tex for better results in our college. Often curriculum vitae and social sciences and technology admission result in our college. And hostel in our better result and better understanding of the day and social life and garden.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College and Hospital, Baramati.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has good environment. The food served in the mess is good. The playgrounds and sports facilities are good. Hostels are good. They provide separate rooms for 2nd and 3rd-year students.

faqs.answer: A:    Hassan Institute of Medical Sciences provides programmes including B.Sc, MBBS, MD, MS in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Optometry, Anaesthesia Technology, Emergency Medical Technology, Medical Laboratory Technology, Dermatology, Microbiology, Physiology, Community Medicine, Anatomy, Ophthalmology, ENT, General Medicine, Pediatrics, Orthopaedics, Toxicology, Pathology, General Surgery, Biochemistry, Anesthesiology, Psychiatry, Radiology.

reviews_list.review_title: Campus is good and well located in Hassan City.

review_content.Placements: They take 150 members every year based on the NEET rank. I am presently studying in 2nd year. All the students who pass the final year MBBS and successfully complete their internship will automatically get job as they become doctors. After you become doctors its your choice to decide whether to study further like pursuing PG and Superspecialities. Your career will be established if you are doctors. But you will be the best doctors only after some years of experience. If you want to pursue higher education it almost takes 10 years for your career establishment. And though you will be the best doctors for the country and the salary will also be higher.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with the clinically oriented study and administrative faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Since it is a medical college, students do not have placements. But some students who are graduated from our college have got admission to very good institutes across the country. There are about 150 students each year. From 2021, our college offers a post-graduation in 5 clinical branches.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college does not provide a Wi-Fi facility. Laboratory and equipment are below par, and the classrooms are good and spacious. Library is small as compared to the number of students, and the hostel is not good. The mess is also not good, and no sports activities are provided.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: What ever happen to our life's we have to study hard.

review_content.Placements: In ore batch we have 150 members in that 75 girls and 75 boys our course is 5& half years in that we have to study for 4 year and we have to do 1yr internship after that we have to do 1 year rural service then we have to give NEET exam for PG and we have to study 3 year PG.
review_content.Infrastructure: We don't have any facilities in our college like free Wi-Fi etc. Labs are so good in classroom we have to sit 150 members so we can't get what teachers told Coming to hostel our hostel is wrost because we don't get 24hr water facility and tiger will be fungus in our rooms.

individual_reviews.title: It's not a satisfactory college to be in from the food to the fest; everything is below average.

content.Placements: After passing your final year, you need to qualify as a doctor, for which you have to complete a mandatory 12-month internship. After getting the degree, most doctors start preparing for the NEET PG exam, which will now be called the Next exam, with a few major changes totally changing the dynamics of problems and solutions.
content.Infrastructure: It's not so bad, but compared to urban colleges such as B.M.C. or M.M.C., it's *** and not worth your time at all. The library is easily accessible to everyone. It's open until 10 pm, and lecture halls remain open during exam time. Sports are not a good and strong point about HIMS; it's a lost case; maybe the government needs some more money. Hostel food is not a good option at all. We usually eat out twice a week to satisfy the taste buds.
