description: Hassan Institute of Medical Sciences cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Hassan Institute of Medical Sciences NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 18762 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Hassan Institute of Medical Sciences MBBS cutoff 2025 was 18762 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 20234 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Hassan Institute of Medical Sciences accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Hassan Institute of Medical Sciences NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 23152 to 159051. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MS and MD, respectively. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Hassan Institute of Medical Sciences MS cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MS in Orthopaedics. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 23152.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

In this section, Hassan Institute of Medical Sciences Karnataka NEET UG cutoff 2025 is available, alongside the last round cutoff of 2024 and 2023 for the general category students. Admission to the MBBS courses is done based on the NEET UG exam ranks, followed by the Karnataka NEET UG counselling process to avail a seat at Hassan Institute of Medical Sciences. As per this year’s cutoff, the General Home State quota stands at a cutoff rank of 32838 for MBBS.

Hassan Institute of Medical Sciences cutoff 2024 for MD and MS courses revealed the growing demand of specialisation preferences among the candidates belonging to different categories. Considering the Hassan Institute of Medical Sciences MD cutoff 2024, the most popular specialisation for admission was M.D. in Radiology with a closing cutoff rank of 653 for the General AI category candidates.

review_content.Placements: Most seniors are good enough and dedicated towards their work and tasks. But, despite having good credits, some get placed in sales companies. Some are guided by the training and placement, which helps them further in getting placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are just for show. If you want to learn something, you need to carry your own laptop. Classes are fair enough to handle students, but they would be more efficient if all classrooms are designed in a curved shape, just being on the stars-like structure.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a decent private college in Varanasi.

review_content.Placements: As of this year, placements are kind of okay as a decent portion of students got placed. The average package ranges from 3-4 LPA and the highest I heard this year ranges from 9 or 10 LPA. The lowest package ranges from 2-3 LPA and those were of sales companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are okay and have a projector. Computers in some of labs are more than 10 years old and have damaged parts and accessories. faqs.answer: A nationwide entrance exam called the Common University Entrance Test (CUET) is required for admission to all undergraduate degrees at all central universities. Registration for CUET UG 2024 closed at 11:50 p.m. on April 5, 2024. The online application for CUET 2024 was open. The CUET 2024 admission card was made available by the National Testing Agency via exams.nta.ac.in/CUET-UG/ on May 29. The CUET 2024 exam for Delhi centres was originally planned for May 15, but the NTA has moved it to May 29. The CUET admit card and intimation slip can be downloaded by candidates who have paid the application fee and registered for the exam.
faqs.question: Q: What is the last date for filling CUET application form?

faqs.answer: CUET UG 2026 exam will be conducted in May/June for 37 subjects. The mode of examination is CBT (Computer Based Test). NTA did not release official notification for CUET UG date sheet. Candidates can know exam details through CUET UG information bulletin. NTA will conduct CUET UG 2026 exam in multiple phases depending upon the number of candidates registering for the exam. Registered candidates can know the exact CUET UG exam on hall ticket. Candidates will have to report at the alloted exam centre on the day of the examination. The exam will be held in two slots each day depending upon the subject combinations chosen by the candidate.
faqs.question: Q: When will be CUET UG exam conducted?

overview_faqs.answer: Yes, MBA is available at Kashi Institute of Technology. The PG-level programme is offered in the full-time mode. The duration of the programme is two years. admission_process.title: Kashi Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Established in 2008,Kashi Institute of Technology (KIT)is an integral part ofKashi Group of Institutions (KGI). The Institute was established in 2008 and is located in Varanasi.KITis a private institution that is affiliated toDr Abdul Kalam Technical University(AKTU). With its 12 year experience of academic excellence, KIT offers holistic education to the students. Apart from Kashi Institute of Technology, KGI also runsKashi Institute of PharmacyandKashi Institute of Management and Science.
KIT is recognised by the AICTE and offers BTech, MBA and Polytechnic Diploma programmes. Top companies like Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini and HCL participate in the KIT placement drive.

Kashi Institute of Technology offers admissions to its undergraduate courses based on national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main and CUET. All of the courses offered at KIT are in regular mode. Find below the key highlights forKashi Institute of Technology admissions 2025:

faqs.question: How is Kashi Institute of Technology for B.Tech CSE?
faqs.answer: If B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) is your choice, then Kashi Institute of Technology (KIT) is the most perfect choice for you. It invites a super strong curriculum that is in line with the actual industry standards; thus, the students receive such knowledge and develop the proper skills in the process. The teaching staff there are professionals with a great deal of experience who are committed to the provision of quality education. The College has several labs equipped with modern technology, which allows the students to explore the practical side of things. The college has launched various technical clubs and events in which students are encouraged to take part for their holistic development.

faqs.question: Which is the top course of Kashi Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Kashi Institute of Technology was established in 2008 and is located in Varanasi. It is a private institution that is affiliated to Dr Abdul Kalam Technical University . It has a 12 year experience of academic excellence, and offers holistic education to students. It has also been awarded Grade A Accreditation by NAAC.  Based on the popularity and industry demand, the B.Tech programs offered by KIT are often considered among the top courses and apart from that the other top and popular courses are MBA, B.Tech, BCA, BBA etc. Even the highest placement record stands for  MBA and B.Tech which us INR 10 LPA.For any further information you can also visit the college website or contact the concerned department for the same.

faqs.question: Is CUET enough for Kashi Institute of Technology, B.Tech admissions?
faqs.answer: The CUET entrance exam is conducted for undergraduate programs, including B.Tech, in central, private, and state universities. 90 universities participated in CUET last year, with several colleges offering B.Tech programs. For example, top colleges like Delhi University, Banaras Hindu University, Central University of Haryana, Central University of Karnataka, Nagaland University, etc., offer B.Tech courses through CUET. Common Exam pattern for taking B.Tech CUET exam is any one Language from List A + Mathematics + Section III of CUET (General Test).

faqs.question: Does Kashi Institute of Technology accept MAT score?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kashi Institute of Technology (KIT) accepts MAT scores for admission to its MBA program.The university accepts various other aptitude tests for MBA and MCA programs as well.For BTech programs, admissions are based on the merit scores obtained from the JEE Main entrance examFor MBA and MCA programs, admissions are made based on the merit scores obtained from the entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, and CUET.

faqs.question: Is Kashi Institute of Technology hard to get?
faqs.answer: No, Kashi Institute of Technology is not hard to get. However, 1- Admission to B.Tech and B.Pharm is done on the basis of JEE Main followed by UPTAC Counselling. 2- For B.Tech and B.Pharm lateral entry in KIT admission is done on the basis of LEET. 3- Candidate must have a Diploma in Engineering/Pharmacy or equivalent bachelor’s degree for eligibility in Lateral Entry program. 4- MBA programme seats are filled on the basis of CAT/MAT/KMET score. 5- For M.Tech. Courses, admission is done on the basis of GATE score. 6- Application process in the college starts in the month of April and candidate must apply separately for each course.

hostel_campus.college_name: Kashi Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is an okay private college for B.Tech in Varanasi.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, but unnecessarily does not work in all parts of the campus, like the labs on the upper floors and the library. The classroom has AC, and it works well in the summer with occasional power cuts. There's a library with books available for all branches.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kashi Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and hostel are good. There are different buildings for different tasks and students can go and study in the particular class in which they are. Hostel is also good but mess food is below average, oily food, and hostel rules are very strict.

reviews.review_heading: If the placement cell works properly and proper guidance is given, then students will benefit.
reviews.review_text: Labs are just for show. If you want to learn something, you need to carry your own laptop. Classes are fair enough to handle students, but they would be more efficient if all classrooms are designed in a curved shape, just being on the stars-like structure.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent private college in Varanasi.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are okay and have a projector. Computers in some of labs are more than 10 years old and have damaged parts and accessories. In the hostel, the food quality dropped drastically last year onwards due to more students opting for the hostel and the number of cooks and serves in the mess being the same.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good infrastructure and placement record. It lacks efficient reaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. It has labs, a library, and sports. There are many computer labs with good computers, and they all are fully air-conditioned. The library is also big enough to manage the whole college, and it consists of several books that are needed.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kashi Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There is Wi-Fi, a library, good classrooms, and computer labs. The hostel is a little bit average. Buildings are well-maintained, and different blocks are made for different batches and courses. The campus is clean.

reviews.review_heading: An Inside from Kashi Institute of Technology: academics, placements, faculty members, and many more.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with some greenery and a beautiful garden. There is a facility of Wi-Fi provided all over the campus. A medium-sized playground with sports like volleyball, kho kho, kabaddi, badminton, cricket, and many more. The quality of food provided in the mess is good and tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Quality learning and a bright future.
reviews.review_text: The campus is spacious and well-maintained, with green surroundings providing a peaceful and conducive atmosphere for studies. KIT offers modern classrooms equipped with projectors and audio-visual aids, well-stocked libraries with books and journals, and state-of-the-art laboratories for hands-on learning. There are separate, secure, and comfortable hostel facilities for boys and girls with essential amenities. Facilities for both indoor and outdoor games are provided including badminton, volle...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with college placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are awesome, and Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are also good. Every class has air conditioning available, and the library is full of books. The quality of food is the best and is made with hygiene and is healthy. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The final year review, as I'm a final year student.
reviews.review_text: We have a great infrastructure in our college. Library building consists of 5 computer labs, and is well-stocked with books. We have Wi-Fi across the campus. There are 2 buildings for B.Tech course. Facilities like water supply, windows, coolers, etc. are available in hostel. Mess food is good and tasty. We get 4 meals breakfast, lunch, evening snacks, and dinner. We do not have 24-hour medical facilities in our college which is a major con. Sports and games facility is up to the mark. We have a...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the placements, facilities and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are good. In every class we have projector and AC. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library are too good. Quality of food is also good with proper hygiene. Sports and games facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: I have got whatever I have aspected from the college. The placements are too good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are good in the college. For example, there is a 24/7 Wi-Fi campus, a canteen, and different rules and regulations that should be followed by the students who have taken admission in hostels, which ensures their security. There is no ragging. There is an anti-ragging committee on the college campus; if you have any complaints about ragging, then you should complain about the problem you are facing.

reviews.review_heading: Educated students with a friendly environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is excellent and the way they maintain every single day is also an outstanding job. The facilities of the college are also very good, and every building represents the glory of the college. Each floor has washrooms and each building has its individual water cooler for drinking water. Classrooms of each branch are very good, they're large, and the seats are comfortable. Labs are also very good; every equipment is present, and lab assistants are always present at the ...

reviews.review_heading: Best placements in Varanasi, UP.
reviews.review_text: In my department, everything is good, like the infrastructure. There are multimedia classrooms, libraries, Wi-Fi and everything that students like. And if I talk about hostels, then hostels are also good—not best but yes, it's average and mess food is very good. Honestly, I like the foods but many friends don't like them. There are so many sports games and canteen. Students play and enjoy eating together.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, I am satisfied with placements, college infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are too large and good. The quality of the hostels is good, and mess and a canteen are also available on campus with the best quality. Medical facilities are also available; qualified doctors check the students and then give them medicine. Games and sports are also available in my college.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Kashi Institute of Technology

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Genpact, HDFC Mutual Fund, Universal Hunt and Parle-G visit our campus for placements.
A lot of companies give internship opportunities to the students in reputed organization.

college_info.intro:
Dharmsinh Desai University comprises more than 15 departments, including Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Information and Technology, Business Administration, Pharmacology, and others. The affiliated colleges and departments of the university offer a wide range of courses at the UG and PG courses. BTech and MBA are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
DDU Nadiad offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The Btech programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Chemical, Civil, Mechanical, CSE, and others. Below mentioned are Dharmsinh Desai University's popular programmes:
For more information check out the below videos:

placements.overview: DDU University admissions are based on both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts various national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, CAT, GATE, etc. Students looking for admission should have at least one of the entrance exams mentioned above. The university determines the cut-off depending on the no. of candidates and the seat availability.

faqs.question: How are the placement of MBA in Dharmsinh Desai University?

faqs.answer: A:    BTech graduates of DD University can seek a variety of career opportunities after BTech. Some common government job opportunities for BTech graduates are mentioned below:PSUs: Companies like BHEL, ONGC, NTPC, and GAIL recruit BTech graduates through competitive exams like GATE.Indian Engineering Services (IES): After completing BTech, students can appear for the Engineering Services Examination (ESE) conducted by the UPSC, which offers prestigious positions in various government department
faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing B.Tech from DDU Nadiad?

faqs.answer: A:    The annual fee for BPharma at DDU Gujarat is INR 1.62 Lacs (approx). The mentioned fee has been sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. In addition to the course fee, the total DDU fees includes components, such as hostel fees, medical insurance, mess and other security deposits, etc.
faqs.question: What is the annual fee for B.Pharma at DDU Gujarat?

faqs.answer: A:    Dharmsinh Desai University offers a BTech programme under seven specialisations. Interested candidates can apply for the programme by visiting the university's official website. Before applying, they must ensure that they meet the preset eligibility criteria for BTech admission at Dharmsinh Desai University. To be eligible to pursue BTech at the university, applicants must have passed Class 12 in the stream of Science from a recognised board. They must have scored a minimum of 45% in Class 12. Additionally, they must submit the documents supporting their eligibility at the time of admission.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.Tech at Dharmsinh Desai University?

faqs.answer: A:    The candidates cannot secure a seat in any government medical college without appearing for the NEET exam. The seats are given based on the score of the NEET. The candidates after giving the NEET Exam need to check the merit list of the college and after clearing the exam the candidates are eligible for counselling. After, the counseling rounds candidates can secure their seats by paying the fees. The rank in DHarmish Desai University for securing a seat for the year 2023 for the general category is around 9546. The rank for the SC/ST category is around 19502. The rank for the EWS category is around 1196 and the rank for OBC Category is around 16222.
faqs.question: Is NEET required for Dharmsinh Desai University?

faqs.answer: A:    GUJCET is the accepted entrance exam for BTech admission at Dharmsinh Desai University. The exam is conducted in March. The exam date changes every year. The exam date for GUJCET 2026 has been announced by the conducting body, i.e. GSEB. The exam will be conducted on March 29, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Dharmsinh Desai University.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement held because no companies come for placement in our final year. All the companies are going to Computer Engineering, IT Engineering, and other, but none are coming to our branch. We are very disappointed that we are not getting companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for DDIT students, especially for boys, but students like girls have hostel facilities. Our department has Wi-Fi, but it only includes browsing Chrome, and it has no speed so we cannot use it better. Also, it doesn't have a network on the college campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The placement department of the college is very good for CE.

review_content.Placements: In my course, around 70 to 80 recent students were placed in the last 5 to 6 years, and others have applied for higher studies. As of the 2024 batch, the highest package is 21 LPA, the average is 8.14 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 5 LPA. Around 90% of students got internships in many local companies. The top role offered is SDE1.
review_content.Infrastructure: As of now, there is no hostel facility provided by the university for the B.Tech degree. The hostel is available only for girls, and the boys' hostel is not available. Since I am a boy, I don't know about the girls' hostel, but as per the feedback, it's above average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: A Good Private Medical College.

review_content.Placements: In MBBS, we don’t have placements, but after the course, we have a compulsory 1-year rotatory internship in the hospital associated with the college, where a stipend is provided as per government laws. Currently, the stipend provided is around 21,000/month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite well and modern. The departments are equipped with all the latest technologies necessary for quality patient care as well as quality studying. The central library has a huge collection of various authors and publications, leaving no resources untouched. The labs are also well-equipped with all the instruments necessary for learning. There is a sports ground on the campus where all the matches take place. Coming to the hostel, the food and facilities are not so good.

faqs.answer: DDU Nadiad conducts BTech admission process in two ways. For 50% for the total seats, candidates with a valid GUJCET score can apply directly on the university's official website or by visiting the university campus in person. The seats are allotted through a merit list based on the GUJCET scores.For the remaining 50% of seats, the allocation is based on applicant's GUJCET rank, followed by ACPC counselling. For this, candidates must visit the official ACPC website. After completing the registration and application process, ACPC will declare a merit list of eligible candidates. After this, eligible candidates can proceed to fill out the choices for their preferred colleges. Seats are allotted to applicants based on the merit list and the choices filled by them.
faqs.question: Q: What is the admission process for B.Tech at DDU Nadiad?

faqs.answer: Dharmsinh Desai University offers a BTech programme under seven specialisations. Interested candidates can apply for the programme by visiting the university's official website. Before applying, they must ensure that they meet the preset eligibility criteria for BTech admission at Dharmsinh Desai University. To be eligible to pursue BTech at the university, applicants must have passed Class 12 in the stream of Science from a recognised board. They must have scored a minimum of 45% in Class 12. Additionally, they must submit the documents supporting their eligibility at the time of admission.
faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility for B.Tech at Dharmsinh Desai University?

faqs.answer: The candidates cannot secure a seat in any government medical college without appearing for the NEET exam. The seats are given based on the score of the NEET. The candidates after giving the NEET Exam need to check the merit list of the college and after clearing the exam the candidates are eligible for counselling. After, the counseling rounds candidates can secure their seats by paying the fees. The rank in DHarmish Desai University for securing a seat for the year 2023 for the general category is around 9546. The rank for the SC/ST category is around 19502. The rank for the EWS category is around 1196 and the rank for OBC Category is around 16222.
faqs.question: Q: Is NEET required for Dharmsinh Desai University?

faqs.answer: GUJCET is the accepted entrance exam for BTech admission at Dharmsinh Desai University. The exam is conducted in March. The exam date changes every year. The exam date for GUJCET 2026 has been announced by the conducting body, i.e. GSEB. The exam will be conducted on March 29, 2026.

review_summary.college_name: Dharmsinh Desai University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is a nice college and is good for students.

content.Placements: 80-90% students get placement. A top company includes Reliance, SR, and Naira. 100% students get an internship. A top role is like a mechanic, machine operator, machine handler, and head in charge. The lowest package is 6 LPA, and the highest package is 20-30 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus has AC and a smart board in the class, and also Wi-Fi. Lab is good in our college. All the needed things are available in the lab. Food is nice with a big cafeteria in our college. We also have a cricket and a football ground in our college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (B.C.A.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Worth taking admission but so much internal exams. Very good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students are getting placed in BCA course as per current year. Top role offered in our course is software web developer. Average package would be around 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HobloxAI and Venom Technology. Around 50% of students get internships from our course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure at DDU are very good like Wi-Fi has some problem but other than that all facilities are very good. Facilities are very good. The atmosphere of college is very positive. For boys, hostel is not there. Hostel is available for girls only. The hostel for girls is also very good like food, places, and the rent. There are some sports activities during February month.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (B.C.A.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dharmsinh Desai Institute of Commerce in the BCA department.

content.Placements: There are no placements because no company came for placements in our finishing year. All companies come for computer engineering and I T engineering students others but not coming for our branch. We are very disappointed that we did not get any company.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for DDIT students or boys but girls get a hostel facility. Our department has a Wi-Fi facility but it only includes browsing Chrome it has no speed, so we can not use it better. There is no network on the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (B.C.A.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dharmsinh Desai University.

content.Placements: There is no placement held because no companies come for placement in our final year. All the companies are going to Computer Engineering, IT Engineering, and other, but none are coming to our branch. We are very disappointed that we are not getting companies.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for DDIT students, especially for boys, but students like girls have hostel facilities. Our department has Wi-Fi, but it only includes browsing Chrome, and it has no speed so we cannot use it better. Also, it doesn't have a network on the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The placement department of the college is very good for CE.

content.Placements: In my course, around 70 to 80 recent students were placed in the last 5 to 6 years, and others have applied for higher studies. As of the 2024 batch, the highest package is 21 LPA, the average is 8.14 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 5 LPA. Around 90% of students got internships in many local companies. The top role offered is SDE1.
content.Infrastructure: As of now, there is no hostel facility provided by the university for the B.Tech degree. The hostel is available only for girls, and the boys' hostel is not available. Since I am a boy, I don't know about the girls' hostel, but as per the feedback, it's above average.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Tech at DDU Nadiad?
faqs.answer: DDU Nadiad conducts BTech admission process in two ways. For 50% for the total seats, candidates with a valid GUJCET score can apply directly on the university's official website or by visiting the university campus in person. The seats are allotted through a merit list based on the GUJCET scores.For the remaining 50% of seats, the allocation is based on applicant's GUJCET rank, followed by ACPC counselling. For this, candidates must visit the official ACPC website. After completing the registration and application process, ACPC will declare a merit list of eligible candidates. After this, eligible candidates can proceed to fill out the choices for their preferred colleges. Seats are allotted to applicants based on the merit list and the choices filled by them.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Dharmsingh Desai University?
faqs.answer: No, the DDU does not give direct admissions. All admissions to UG and PG courses are done through entrance exams. The exams for different courses are aken by DDU itself.The entrance exams for UG courses are:DDUCET (Dharmsinh Desai University Common Entrance Test) for engineering and technology coursesDDUPAT (Dharmsinh Desai University Pharmacy Aptitude Test) for pharmacy coursesDDUMCA (Dharmsinh Desai University Management Common Admission Test) for MBA and MCA coursesThe entrance exams for postgraduate courses are:DDU PGCET (Dharmsinh Desai University Post Graduate Common Entrance Test) for M.Tech and M.Sc. coursesDDU MBA (Dharmsinh Desai University MBA) for MBA coursesDDU MCA (Dharmsinh Desai University MCA) for MCA coursesApplication can be made online. The exams takes place in various cities across India. The dates for the entrance exams are announced on the DDU website.The cutoff for admission to different courses is based on the marks obtained in the entrance exam. Criteria for c

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.Tech at Dharmsinh Desai University?
faqs.answer: Dharmsinh Desai University offers a BTech programme under seven specialisations. Interested candidates can apply for the programme by visiting the university's official website. Before applying, they must ensure that they meet the preset eligibility criteria for BTech admission at Dharmsinh Desai University. To be eligible to pursue BTech at the university, applicants must have passed Class 12 in the stream of Science from a recognised board. They must have scored a minimum of 45% in Class 12. Additionally, they must submit the documents supporting their eligibility at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Is NEET required for Dharmsinh Desai University?
faqs.answer: The candidates cannot secure a seat in any government medical college without appearing for the NEET exam. The seats are given based on the score of the NEET. The candidates after giving the NEET Exam need to check the merit list of the college and after clearing the exam the candidates are eligible for counselling. After, the counseling rounds candidates can secure their seats by paying the fees. The rank in DHarmish Desai University for securing a seat for the year 2023 for the general category is around 9546. The rank for the SC/ST category is around 19502. The rank for the EWS category is around 1196 and the rank for OBC Category is around 16222.

placement_report.college_name: Dharmsinh Desai University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Dharmsinh Desai University Placement overview
paragraphs: According to Dharmsinh Desai University (DDU) overall NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during DDU PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 3.5 LPA . Apart from this, as per the Management and Technology NIRF reports 2023, the median package offered during DDU MBA and BTech placements 2022 stood at INR 3.5 LPA and INR 4.5 LPA , respectively.

Dharmsinh Desai University (DDU), Nadiad has concluded its placements for the Technology and MBA batches passing out in 2022. As per the latest report, the highest package offered to the students of the Faculty of Technology during the 2022 placement drive was INR 25 LPA . Further, the highest package offered to the students of MBA stood at INR 6.09 LPA . The institute attracted over 100 recruiters for Engineering placements 2022 who offered a variety of job roles to around 560 students . The top recruiters of DDU Nadiad in 2022 included TCS, Infosys, S&P Global, HFFC, Ocean Finvest , etc.

tables.context: What is the salary offered during B.Tech placement

faqs.question: What is the salary offered during B.Tech placements at Dharmsinh Desai University?
faqs.answer: The salary package offered during Dharmsinh Desai University BTech placements varies from year to year. It also varies across the various BTech specialisations offered at the university. The following table presents the median salary package offered during BTech placements, as per the latest NIRF Report of DDU Nadiad: Year Median Package 2022-23 INR 4.56 LPA 2021-22 INR 4.5 LPA 2020-21 INR 4.04 LPA

faqs.question: How are the placement of MBA in Dharmsinh Desai University?
faqs.answer: Dharmsinh Desai University (DDU), has concluded its placements for the MBA and other batches passed out in 2022. As per the report provided by Dharmsinh Desai Univerisity, the highest package offered to the students of the Faculty of Technology during the 2022 placements was INR 25 LPA. The highest package offered to the students of MBA is INR 6.09 LPA. DDU Nadiad has an excellent working placement cell that is highly active which is helping all students to secure jobs and internships.Companies that recruit management students comes for marketing field. Marketing, IT companies, banks, finance companies, insurance companies come for placements.

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing B.Tech from DDU Nadiad?
faqs.answer: BTech graduates of DD University can seek a variety of career opportunities after BTech . Some common government job opportunities for BTech graduates are mentioned below: PSUs: Companies like BHEL, ONGC, NTPC, and GAIL recruit BTech graduates through competitive exams like GATE. Indian Engineering Services (IES): After completing BTech, students can appear for the Engineering Services Examination (ESE) conducted by the UPSC, which offers prestigious positions in various government departments. Defence Services: BTech graduates can join the Indian Army, Navy, or Air Force through exams like the Combined Defence Services (CDS) or Technical Entry Schemes (TES). Railway Jobs: Indian Railways recruit engineers through the Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) for various technical positions. State Public Service Commissions: Various state governments conduct exams for Engineering roles in state departments.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects after pursuing B.Pharma at DDU?
faqs.answer: There is a wide scope of M after pursuing BPharma at DDU. BPharma graduates can take up job roles in the pharmaceutical and healthcare industries. They can also build careers in the research and education sectors. Some job options available for the university's BPharma graduates are Pharmacists, Clinical Pharmacists, Chemical Technicians, Medical Writers, Medical Representatives, etc. Graduates can also pursue courses such as M Pharma , Pharma D, D Pharm, MBA, Clinical Research/Public Health courses, etc. to further their knowledge and specialisation.

faqs.question: What is the fees for DDU Nadiad MBA?
faqs.answer: DDU Nadiad MBA fee is INR 3 Lacs for the entire course duration. The course duration of the programme is two years. It must be noted that the mentioned fee has been sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. Other components included in the total MBA fee at DDU may include hostel fees, medical insurance, one-time fees, mess and other security deposits, etc.

faqs.question: Is Dharmsinh Desai University expensive?
faqs.answer: The college is not so costly. The tuition fee of the college is usually affordable and students can easily focus on their studies rather than bother about the cost of the college. The total fees of the college for a four-year programme of MBBS is nearly 20.3 L-35.3L. The fee for the PGDM course is about 3.2 L. One can check the fees by visiting the official website of the college and then clicking on the admission tab and can call the given number for fee inquiries and can also see the PDFs that are uploaded on the website of the college. For, further inquiry candidates can even visit the college.

faqs.question: How are the placements for MBA in DDU?
faqs.answer: Dharmsinh Desai University MBA placements have shown an improving trend over the past three years. The university provides placement opportunities for jobs and summer internships to the students enrolled in their MBA programme. As per the DDU students reviews on Shiksha.com , the average rating for MBA placements at the university is 4 out of 5. The following table presents the DDU MBA placement insights, as per the university's latest NIRF Report: Year Median Package Students Placed 2022-23 INR 4.04 LPA 49 2021-22 INR 3.50 LPA 39 2020-21 INR 3.10 LPA 36

faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities that I can seek after completing B.Pharma at DDU?
faqs.answer: Yes, after graduating with a BPharma degree from DDU, students can join various central and state government organisations. They can seek jobs in reputed companies such as the Indian Council of Medical Research, the Central Standard Control Organisation, and more. Tabulated below are some of the job profiles for BPharma graduates of DDU: Government Jobs After BPharm TSPSC Drug Inspector SBI Pharmacist MPSC Pharmacist ESIC Pharmacist Railway (RRB) Pharmacist OPSC Drug Inspector

reviews.review_heading: This is a nice college and is good for students.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has AC and a smart board in the class, and also Wi-Fi. Lab is good in our college. All the needed things are available in the lab. Food is nice with a big cafeteria in our college. We also have a cricket and a football ground in our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Dharmsinh Desai Institute of CommerceReviewed on 19 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Worth taking admission but so much internal exams. Very good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure at DDU are very good like Wi-Fi has some problem but other than that all facilities are very good. Facilities are very good. The atmosphere of college is very positive. For boys, hostel is not there. Hostel is available for girls only. The hostel for girls is also very good like food, places, and the rent. There are some sports activities during February month.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Dharmsinh Desai Institute of CommerceReviewed on 16 Apr 2025)

reviews.review_text: There is no hostel for DDIT students or boys but girls get a hostel facility. Our department has a Wi-Fi facility but it only includes browsing Chrome it has no speed, so we can not use it better. There is no network on the college campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Dharmsinh Desai Institute of CommerceReviewed on 8 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Dharmsinh Desai University.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel for DDIT students, especially for boys, but students like girls have hostel facilities. Our department has Wi-Fi, but it only includes browsing Chrome, and it has no speed so we cannot use it better. Also, it doesn't have a network on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: The placement department of the college is very good for CE.
reviews.review_text: As of now, there is no hostel facility provided by the university for the B.Tech degree. The hostel is available only for girls, and the boys' hostel is not available. Since I am a boy, I don't know about the girls' hostel, but as per the feedback, it's above average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Dr. N.D. Desai Faculty of Medical Science and ResearchReviewed on 17 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A Good Private Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite well and modern. The departments are equipped with all the latest technologies necessary for quality patient care as well as quality studying. The central library has a huge collection of various authors and publications, leaving no resources untouched. The labs are also well-equipped with all the instruments necessary for learning. There is a sports ground on the campus where all the matches take place. Coming to the hostel, the food and facilities are not so good.

reviews.review_heading: DDU Nadiad: Excellence redefined.
reviews.review_text: Dharmsinh Desai University (DDU) boasts a well-designed 42-acre campus in Nadiad, Gujarat. It includes modern academic blocks, state-of-the-art laboratories, a well-stocked library, and advanced research centers. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, promoting seamless digital learning. Recreational facilities include a sports complex, gymnasium, and a well-maintained cafeteria. Specialised facilities like nanotechnology labs and dental clinics are available to enhance learning. The university also has g...

reviews.review_heading: Good college, but poor college, life, and average campus.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very bad, and it needs to be renovated. Apart from that, the technology and the projectors in classrooms are good, and the computers and laboratories are also good, but there is a need to develop and reconstruct or renovate the campus and the library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dharmsinh Desai Institute of CommerceReviewed on 9 Aug 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The great college one can get enrolled for the technology courses in Gujurat .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is great highly ventilated high teach has free Wi-Fi all over the campus with high-speed, the classrooms are central AC and with the projectors for making the learning simplified for better understanding by the students, there are also the 5-6 computer labs for specially this course the labs are with the latest computers with all the necessities like best software etc., centralized AC, there? S a dedicated library with the computers so you can get the maximum kno...

reviews.review_heading: DDIT information and brief.
reviews.review_text:
The canteen has good-quality food and is also affordable for students. There are clubs like sports, reading, and photography clubs.
The classrooms are very nice and neat. Mess food is also good and cheap. Many students used to eat mess food in break time.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are helpful, good curriculum, fewer extracurricular activities, avg placement.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel is just for girls, which is okayish. There isn't much scope for extracurricular activities. However, there are clubs for students to be a part of. The labs are alright, and classrooms are fine as well. The library provides all the necessary books.

reviews.review_heading: Information about DDIT college.
reviews.review_text: I chose this course because I have a special interest in Physics, and I also found this course very interesting. The curriculum of this course was very engaging, which helped me to choose this exam. The canteen has good quality food and is also affordable for students. There are clubs like sports, reading, and photography clubs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Dharmsinh Desai Institute of CommerceReviewed on 16 Apr 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I'm not satisfied with the faculty and teaching, but the placements are the best.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are strict and non-cooperative, but teaching is okay. Infra is hexagonal, and there are many trees and plants in my college. There is Wi-Fi, but only for the teachers. There is a huge library. And classrooms are okay. There are no other curriculum activities. The college and faculty members are strict.

reviews.review_heading: The college with a positive vibe.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very positive environment on campus. There are all the facilities available in the college like labs, library, medical facilities, sports facilities, canteens, etc. The library of the college has all the necessary stuff. Labs have all the required equipment. The canteen of the college has all types of food. The college has no hostel facility. The college has indoor and outdoor sports grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious. Hostel facilities are not good. The food served in the canteen is very good. Sports are conducted in this college. Separate hostels are available for both boys and girls.

They are also eligible to apply for the scholarships for SC/ST candidates provided by the state and central government.

courses.overview: Apollo Medskills, Chennai Courses & Fees 2025 Apollo Medskills, Chennai is known for its diverse academic offerings, catering to students across multiple disciplines. The Apollo Medskills, Chennai provides UG and PG courses that prepare candidates for their professional careers. faqs.answer: Different reasons for flunking nursing classes are so numerous, yet unique to each and every person. Some of main causes that normally lead to one experiencing academic difficulties in nursing classes are:Difficulty understanding concepts: nursing programs are demanding, and it is genuinely tough to grasp very complicated medical concepts, procedures, and pharmacology.Clinical performance problems: These can be concerns for students who are experiencing complications with clinical skills or interpersonal communications.Poor study habits: One of most important study skills in any nursing program. A student who does not have proper study habits, time management, or organizational skills might not manage to keep pace according to coursework.Overwhelmed by workload: workload, in particular, can be intense in nursing programs, leaving students overwhelmed as to what to learn and acquire, complete as assignments, and spend in clinical hours.

reviews_list.review_title: If you just want to be a graduate or postgraduate, then only come to this college.

review_content.Placements: They only give provisional placements for 3 months, and if you qualify provisional period, you get a permanent placement, but your package will be, like, 1.2 LPA. First three months, the HRs will treat you nicely, but as soon as your provisional period ends, they will get rude with you, as the responsibility of the university ends after the provisional period. They will react as if they never wanted to hire you.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure does not live up to the mark, especially if you are applying for Computer Science Engineering. Labs of CSE do not work most of the time, as we are using Windows 11 and the latest features on our PCs. But they are stuck on Windows 7 and 1 GB RAM computers, which cannot even handle two Chrome tabs. How will we design an AI model on these computers.

reviews_list.review_title: Very nice university give good placements.

review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and well-ventilated classrooms with AC were available, along with a huge library accessible 24/7. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college provides a good experience and good weather.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students get placed every year. The median package is 3-4 LPA. Most percent of students get placed in the internship. Physiotherapist roles are offered in our course, and we get Dr. Prefix and a medical course from a well-reputed college.
content.Infrastructure: We have a library and Wi-Fi available in the university. The classrooms are well-furnished, and the labs have equipment. The facilities in the hostel are good, with wooden beds, clean bathrooms, and separate washrooms for each room. The mess food is also okay, and medical facilities are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very friendly teachers, average placements, good infrastructure, and beautiful environment.

content.Placements: Usually 60% of students get placement directly through the college. Maximum others are also able to land a good job on their own. The average package in B.Tech computer science is 8 LPA - 9 LPA, and the highest package given is 25 LPA. Infosys, Amazon, Microsoft, and many more are the top recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: The university is sitting on the lap of mother nature and is surrounded by green lush mountains. The weather here is optimal and moderately cold. It includes one physics lab, mechanical lab, chemistry lab, physiotherapy lab, and 2 computer labs. There are multiple sports grounds and basketball court in it with a mini football ground as well. The food here is moderate. They have one dispensary and one animal dispensary.

admission_process.title: Bahra University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Bahra University admissionis open for all the courses. The university offers UG, PG, diploma and Doctoral programmes specialised in Engineering, Commerce, Pharmacy and others.Bahra Universityconducted an online mode of application. Admission to all the courses is both merit entrance based. Applicants looking for admission to the university can apply online through the official website of the university. Read the below article to know more about Bahra University admission, course-wise eligibility, selection criteria, seat, fees and admission process:

Bahra University offers entrance and merit-based admission to all its courses. Admission to all UG, PG, diploma and PhD courses is open. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective course will have to appear for the entrance exam for admission to BTech courses. Further, for other courses, admission is based on the last qualifying exam score and Counsellor Interaction. The table below lists courses offered at Bahra University courses eligibility along with their accepted entrance exams, & selection process:
Check here for more to know more aboutBahra University courses:
Download:Bahra University Prospectus

Bahra University feeis a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually. Check below the total tuition fee for top Bahra University courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Bahra University seatintake varies course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Below is the intake for top Bahra University courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Bahra University's admission process includes registration followed by a conversation with the admission counsellor. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in BU:
STEP 1: Bahra University Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. The application fee at BU is INR 1,100.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to the courses is both merit and entrance-based. The university has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to BTech. Further, for other courses university offers merit-based admission, followed by counsellor Interaction. The university also has the facility for provisional registration or seat booking by paying an amount of INR 10,000.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted, they need to come for the document verification. Selected candidates need to pay aBahra University course feeto confirm their admission.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides a good experience and good weather.
reviews.review_text: We have a library and Wi-Fi available in the university. The classrooms are well-furnished, and the labs have equipment. The facilities in the hostel are good, with wooden beds, clean bathrooms, and separate washrooms for each room. The mess food is also okay, and medical facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Very friendly teachers, average placements, good infrastructure, and beautiful environment.
reviews.review_text: The university is sitting on the lap of mother nature and is surrounded by green lush mountains. The weather here is optimal and moderately cold. It includes one physics lab, mechanical lab, chemistry lab, physiotherapy lab, and 2 computer labs. There are multiple sports grounds and basketball court in it with a mini football ground as well. The food here is moderate. They have one dispensary and one animal dispensary.

reviews.review_heading: If you just want to be a graduate or postgraduate, then only come to this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure does not live up to the mark, especially if you are applying for Computer Science Engineering. Labs of CSE do not work most of the time, as we are using Windows 11 and the latest features on our PCs. But they are stuck on Windows 7 and 1 GB RAM computers, which cannot even handle two Chrome tabs. How will we design an AI model on these computers.

reviews.review_heading: Very nice university give good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and well-ventilated classrooms with AC were available, along with a huge library accessible 24/7. Water coolers with rat control measures were provided. The hostel facilities were good for bed students, and the quality of food was good. A physiotherapy OPD was available. However, there were no canteens. Sports and games were also conducted.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the faculty and the placement system of the college in 2024.
reviews.review_text: The college has classrooms, blackboards, and a library, but there is no Wi-Fi or smart boards, which makes understanding difficult. Additionally, cameras are also not available. The quality of food provided in the college mess is very poor, the mess is untidy, and the food prepared doesn't taste good.

reviews.review_heading: Bahra University review for BCA students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like well-managed classrooms and labs for students with 4 types of windows like Linux, Microsoft, and others are provided.  Hostel facilities are well-managed. Food is well prepared. Games are playable inside the auditorium. College provides a healthy food cafeteria.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Bahra.
reviews.review_text: Bahra University offers state-of-the-art infrastructures that render its campuses conducive to students' learning. This campus has modern classrooms equipped with advanced audio-visual aids, digitized libraries housing numerous titles and other resources, and sophisticated laboratories for hands-on learning across various sectors. This university provides its students with high-speed internet connectivity and bullet-proof IT infrastructure to facilitate academic and research endeavors. Further p...

reviews.review_heading: Really good nature and climate the whole year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is quite good; the labs are big and well managed. Also, the classes are good for study and the Wi-Fi is not that good because of the low speed of internet and the library is open 24/7, which is a very good thing; students can study in the library anytime. The hostel food is bad because the taste is not good and the quality is also not very good. Medical facilities are available but not good. No sports or games are there in our university.

reviews.review_heading: In this, I have given a brief review of Bahra University. By reading this, one can easily understand
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi speed is very slow. In computer labs, computers hang too much, and some of them are not working. Keyboards are of low quality. Physics labs and Chemistry labs are good. The library is also good, and almost all required books are present there. Hostel facilities are average. Medical facilities are present. Food in the mess is sometimes good and sometimes bad. There is a ground to play games in front of the hostels. That is the only ground, which is a negative point. Canteens are present, in...

reviews.review_heading: Bahra university review.
reviews.review_text: Labs and the library are well-managed in my university. Classrooms are well-managed. Infrastructure is good. The hostel is well-managed by the warden, sir. Food quality is good for their state people. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are not playable there.

reviews.review_heading: All about Bahra University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay, not too good. Wi-Fi of the hostel and university both don't work rightly. Also, the computers from the computer lab don't work, they arrange them for show. Classrooms are too small for 80 students. The library is good but some of the important books are not there. If you complain to them, it's a long process to get a new book.

reviews.review_heading: About my college BAHRA UNIVERSITY.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good, the classrooms are well designed and there are proper seating arrangements for the children. They have provided proper benches and tables for students to study. The facilities at the hostel are also good; they have well-maintained rooms in the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Very much dissatisfied. Please do a good research before choosing a college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. In the classrooms, some seats are broken, and the Wi-Fi speed is poor. In the labs, computers often hang, and there are frequent issues, such as slow internet or malfunctioning systems. For the sports department, there is only one ground where events are held. Mess food is average—sometimes good, sometimes bad. Medical facilities are available, including a university ambulance. Hostel rooms are average, with 3-4 students sharing a room.

reviews.review_heading: NextGen faculty is the best, and the other faculty of the college is also helpfu
reviews.review_text: The course is designed to help students, and the hostel is fine, helping students manage their time efficiently. Food is prepared daily, and everything is great. Every faculty member, including non-teaching staff who help in the hostel, mess, and wardens for safety, is helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Very good private university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. We have Wi-Fi facilities in our labs, making it easy to complete our work. Regarding hostels, we have Wi-Fi and attached bathrooms in every room. The quality of food in the mess is good, and we also have medical facilities available.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Bahra University

overview_faqs.question: Is LJ Institute of Pharmacy worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: LJ Institute of Pharmacy is a prestigious institution that offers B.Pharma, M.Pharma programs. Students have the option to enroll in these courses to start their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. The institute is renowned for its dedicated and experienced faculty members who are committed to delivering these programs. LJ Institute of Pharmacy has earned a remarkable review rating of 4.08 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Furthermore, it has received ratings of 4.11 for Campus Life, 4.22 for Placements, 4.11 for Faculty, and 4.28 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: LJ Institute of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Information about the L.J. Institute of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: I am Mangukiya Bhautik Parshotambhai. I am studying at the LJ Institute of Pharmacy. The college invites many recruiting companies like Zydus, Yudiz, Valens, Unicom, Abbott, Cipla, etc. It offers 90% placement for pharmacy students. So it's a good college for pharmacy studies.
content.Infrastructure: The L.J. Institute of Pharmacy's infrastructure is good. It is an old college, but all facilities are available for studying. All classrooms have air conditioning, the library is good, the laboratory is very good, and all instruments are available for the practical. The water supply is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with good placements.

content.Placements: Our college provides very good placement facilities. They arrange events for placements and organise motivational events through which students can persuade their interests. Many organisations come to offer placement opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are well designed. All types of activities are conducted. There are air-conditioners in some classes. The library has lots of books for students. A computer lab is available. All the rooms are clean and hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has the best study environment for students.

content.Placements: There are various companies that visit the college for the best placements. There are various roles offered in different fields like regulatory affairs, quality assurance, quality control, management areas, etc. Companies like Zydus and TCS also visit the campus for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college has the necessary infrastructure. It provides all types of facilities and equipment. There are perfect classrooms, laboratories, libraries, a sports center, Wi-Fi, and smart boards. The college maintains good hygiene. The college has well-equipped laboratories.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is an awesome college to enjoy college life. Placements are awesome.

content.Placements: This institute is good to gain knowledge. There is an atmosphere of study and enjoyment. While studying in this college, I enjoyed a lot. Our college building is double storeyed and consists of one huge auditorium, 24 classrooms, principal's office, staff room and office rooms. Every room is commodious, well-light and well ventilated.
content.Infrastructure: There are all facilities for studies. The canteen is very clean, and the cold Coco served there is most famous. Most of the games are played in our college. In sports week, cricket, kabaddi, badminton, chess, race and all games are involved. In case of an emergency, there are medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of good faculty and placements, and lots of facilities.

content.Placements: I am from the 2019 -20 batch. I got admission through ACPC in LJ Institute of Pharmacy. Our batch got 1st rank in GTU in the 1st semester. In our college, 50 to 60% of students got internships in various pharma companies. In our course, the packages range from 3-7 LPA by pharma companies.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, 10 labs are available for different subjects. AC classrooms are available for great studies. An auditorium and smart classrooms with projectors are available. The canteen is hygienic, and various food items are available. Our college has a huge library, with books related to all courses.

reviews.review_heading: The fact and the genuine review of LJ College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very nice but I'd like to give it 4 stars because of little nations so you can admit you in college. But if possible don't opt for hostel or PG because in the PG, there are very vulgar public who fully addicted to cigarettes and other stuff things.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members, staff, and labs are good enough for gathering knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms and library are very helpful. The maintenance of cleanness is carried out in our college which is a good thing. The college canteen is of the extremely poor level also it is not maintained for any cleanliness. My experience in the college canteen is very bad. The sports ground is very huge.

reviews.review_heading: Good Faculty staff. Lab is average. Library is good enough for gathering knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The lab facilities are average but not poor. The library is good enough to gather knowledge. The sports ground is good, the campus is very large and the canteen is poor. The classrooms are maintained very clean. College buildings are maintained for cleanness including labs and library. Sports events are also arranged by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Nice experience nice to meet all students.
reviews.review_text: LJ Institute of pharmacy building is a very big, clean and peaceful place. In my College, BPharm & MPharma courses are available in different labs. Best quality of facilities are available in my college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of LJ Institute of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all types of facilities for students to study easily. There is a free Wi-Fi facility for all the students. Labs are very good because the pharmacy course needs a good lab. Students can borrow a book for 15 days free of cost from the library.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi on campus. Labs are okay, but not excellent. Classrooms are spacious, but the seating is not comfortable. The library facility is good, but the books contain an outdated syllabus. No medical facilities are available. Sports occur just once a year. Sports are organised by seniors, so it is biased.

review_content.Placements: Everyone who passes MBBS become a doctor. During the time of internship, they offered Rs 28,000 - Rs 31,000. Companies did not recruit MBBS students. Everyone got internships in the college hospital. Doctor was obviously the role offered to us as we were MBBS students, not engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: We had a Wi-Fi facility, which did not work properly sometimes but we had it everywhere in the hostel building and academy building. The rooms in the hostel were average. But the food was below average, it was good only at the time of grand feast, which occurs once a month

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Beware of brokers who charge extra money. Infrastructure is good, but faculty is average.

review_content.Placements: The placements depend on your own marks and the quality of your practical knowledge. The patient flow is very low. Case studies are not available. The internship package is also low, which is around INR 15k. The students are bound to stay in hostels, and thus the cost is not worth it overall.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good. And the hostel rooms are bad considering the price is high and it is strictly required to stay in a hostel. The average non-AC 4 sharing starts at around INR 1 lacs 2k, and the fooding cost is 72k. AC double sharing ranges up to INR 2 lacs plus fooding (INR 72k included).

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides average infrastructure.

review_content.Infrastructure: Mess, canteen, sports, and gym are accessible. College ground is within the campus. Recreation rooms are present in all hostel buildings as indoor leisure activities. There is a multispecialty hospital with PG seats.
review_content.Faculty: All other medical colleges are not easy. Faculty members and non-teaching staff members are friendly and helpful. The pass marks are average. Other courses like nursing, engineering, and paramedical are also offered at this college. Faculty members are talented and caring. Mentorship programs are conducted among students and staff members.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It does not have good infrastructure, but faculty members are well-qualified.

content.Placements: There are 200 students in our batch. This is a course where earning depends on individuals. We don't get recruitment in companies, but everyone gets internships. The top roles offered are master of surgery and MD. If someone is focused on their career, they will be a great doctor someday.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. The infrastructure is not that good for now, and it is still under construction. The college started in 2019. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all good. The hostel is good and the mess is poor. The canteen is not so good. Medical facilities are good. It is a medical college but various medicines are not available here.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college with multiple opportunities.

content.Placements: A full one-year internship is offered after completion of a 4.5-year curriculum with an average salary of minimum Rs 30,000. After that, you can apply to any hospital for further studies and practice. In the internship, there are shifts for the doctors where they have to work.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-maintained, academics are excellent, and wards are also good. There are 4 lecture theaters with a capacity of 300 students. Every theater has live projectors and is completely air-conditioned. There are 3 hostels where male and female candidates can reside separately. Each lab has multiple facilities where student can perform their own practicals. There are several lab technicians in each lab.

hostel_campus.college_name: Shri Ramkrishna Institute of Medical Sciences and Sanaka Hospitals Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It does not have good infrastructure, but faculty members are well-qualified.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. The infrastructure is not that good for now, and it is still under construction. The college started in 2019. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all good. The hostel is good and the mess is poor. The canteen is not so good. Medical facilities are good. It is a medical college but various medicines are not available here.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with multiple opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-maintained, academics are excellent, and wards are also good. There are 4 lecture theaters with a capacity of 300 students. Every theater has live projectors and is completely air-conditioned. There are 3 hostels where male and female candidates can reside separately. Each lab has multiple facilities where student can perform their own practicals. There are several lab technicians in each lab.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are average and infrastructure is in progress.
reviews.review_text: We had a Wi-Fi facility, which did not work properly sometimes but we had it everywhere in the hostel building and academy building. The rooms in the hostel were average. But the food was below average, it was good only at the time of grand feast, which occurs once a month

reviews.review_heading: Beware of brokers who charge extra money. Infrastructure is good, but faculty is average.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. And the hostel rooms are bad considering the price is high and it is strictly required to stay in a hostel. The average non-AC 4 sharing starts at around INR 1 lacs 2k, and the fooding cost is 72k. AC double sharing ranges up to INR 2 lacs plus fooding (INR 72k included).

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Mess, canteen, sports, and gym are accessible. College ground is within the campus. Recreation rooms are present in all hostel buildings as indoor leisure activities. There is a multispecialty hospital with PG seats.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Ramkrishna Institute of Medical Sciences and Sanaka Hospitals.
reviews.review_text: The college is quite new. The hostels and college are new. The infrastructure of our college is good. A high-speed Wi-Fi facility is available in the college as well as in hostels. The quality of food served in a mess is above average. Buildings are new. Canteens are available. There are separate hostels for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is okay in this college.
reviews.review_text: There is no any type of sports and games in our college because that college is for medical field only. The canteens, medical facilities like biology labs are very hygienic and well maintained. If you want something then you can buy from canteens on the premises.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, Good faculty, Friendly Environment, Supportive Seniors and Professors.
reviews.review_text: Food is average, there is canteen, space for sports is also here. There is availability of Wi-Fi. A serene environment. Library is also there. Hostel are really good. Medical facilities are there also. Labs are newly equipped and well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: This is very good college for placement of student along with a renowned hospital.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of Wi-Fi is available everywhere in college campus including hostel. There are Separate lecture theatre, library, practical room and laboratory in this college. Quality of food of mess is good but not the best right now. But I hope this issue will solve shortly. Medical facilities is good. A proper ground is here for sports. There are separate cricket pitch, Football ground, badminton court.

college_info.intro:
Al-Ameen College of Pharmacy flagship programmes are BPharm and MPharm. At college, the BPharm programme is a four-year full-time course. The MPharm programme is a two-year (four-semester) full-time course. BPharm and MPharm students are placed in top companies such as Apollo Pharmacy, MedPlus, Biocon, Dr Reddy's Laboratories Ltd, Aurobindo, Accenture, and Micro Lab, among others.
Al-Ameen College of Pharmacy provides international quality education to students. Overall, Al-Ameen College of Pharmacy is one of the best colleges offering quality education to students. After completing their education at Al-Ameen College of Pharmacy, students can become pharmacists, drug inspectors, food inspectors, medical underwriters, or even open a drugstore, and others.
