review_summary.college_name: Al-Ameen College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: My dream college AL-AMEEN.

content.Placements: Placements are good, but only students with good marks are placed based on their knowledge and marks, and placements overall are 20-30 percent in our college. Companies like Apollo, etc., recruit. The highest package was 3 LPA and the lowest was 1.5 LPA. Roles like medicine distributor, medical in-charge, etc., are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The laboratories are very good, and the teachers are very supportive. The library is also available in the college, and we can also participate in sports events organized in the college. Studies are truly very good with experienced faculty, and Wi-Fi is also available. The classrooms are neat and clean.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This is the worst college in my life.

content.Placements: There are no placements offered; if offered, there is no proper information given, and they ask us to work for free for 10 hours. It is one of the worst colleges I have ever been to. Only a few teachers are good, and the principal has no manners; he is the worst person I have ever seen in my life.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are the worst part. There are no proper benches. They have made the computer lab our classrooms, which is the worst thing a college can do. There are no fans and no proper painting. They do it only for NAC work. The infrastructure is the worst; there are no fans in some classes, and only after students demand, they do the work. They don't include D. Pharma students in any activity; they only include B. Pharma and Pharma D students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very Satisfied Because of Faculty, Placements, Infrastructure, Facilities, etc.

content.Placements: The placements in my college are quite well assured as, out of 100%, the chances of students getting placed are about 25-30% who have both book as well as skillful knowledge, with equal importance in sports. The highest package is 22L per annum, and the lowest is 5L per annum. The top recruiting companies that visit our college are Cipla, Novartis, etc. 15-20% of students get internships in their final year in such companies that hire for research and development purposes. The top roles offered in my course are profiles in Research and Development, Formulation, and Manufacturing departments.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The best college in the state and among the top pharmacy colleges in the country.

content.Placements: Many companies come every year to our college for placements. The percentage of students getting a job through college is 70%. The highest package was 5 lakh per annum and the lowest package was 2 lakh per annum. Top roles offered in our course are pharmacists.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good, but when you talk about sports like ground, indoor stadium, and auditorium, we do not have such facilities in our college. The classrooms and the labs are well equipped and well maintained, but unfortunately, you don't have AC rooms or AC labs.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A short review of Al-Ameen College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Almost 30% of the students were placed from our campus, and the highest package was 6L pa. And most of the students got an internship, which is very helpful for further reference. Most of the roles that the students got were primary work as they were freshmen.
content.Infrastructure: The campus outside is not up to mark; its just two long buildings with no proper sports ground, an auditorium, or anything but two buildings. But inside the building there are well-furnished classrooms and fully equipped labs with all the facilities required for a pharmacy college.

reviews.review_heading: My dream college AL-AMEEN.
reviews.review_text: The laboratories are very good, and the teachers are very supportive. The library is also available in the college, and we can also participate in sports events organized in the college. Studies are truly very good with experienced faculty, and Wi-Fi is also available. The classrooms are neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: This is the worst college in my life.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are the worst part. There are no proper benches. They have made the computer lab our classrooms, which is the worst thing a college can do. There are no fans and no proper painting. They do it only for NAC work. The infrastructure is the worst; there are no fans in some classes, and only after students demand, they do the work. They don't include D. Pharma students in any activity; they only include B. Pharma and Pharma D students.

reviews.review_heading: Very Satisfied Because of Faculty, Placements, Infrastructure, Facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty good as it has great architectural patterns on the outside, which gives it an old vintage kind of look. The facilities are also well provided as there is functional Wi-Fi with great connectivity given access to students requiring it during their projects and labs. The labs are also clean and well-equipped with instruments that help us learn the formulations and other required procedures that help us gain practical knowledge. The classrooms are neat, pr...

reviews.review_heading: The best college in the state and among the top pharmacy colleges in the country.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, but when you talk about sports like ground, indoor stadium, and auditorium, we do not have such facilities in our college. The classrooms and the labs are well equipped and well maintained, but unfortunately, you don't have AC rooms or AC labs.

reviews.review_heading: A short review of Al-Ameen College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The campus outside is not up to mark; its just two long buildings with no proper sports ground, an auditorium, or anything but two buildings. But inside the building there are well-furnished classrooms and fully equipped labs with all the facilities required for a pharmacy college.

reviews.review_heading: AACP- molding future pharmacists.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good with well-equipped classroom with air conditioned, smart boards, white boards and projectors. The library has books and journal and issue student library card which with books can be issue for a duration of 2 weeks. The quality of food and facilities in hostel is good with Wi-Fi connection and the food quality is satisfactory, serving chicken, eggs, noodles and snacks in the evening.

reviews.review_heading: After 2 years, they are asking for double the college fees.
reviews.review_text: There are very few facilities provided in college, like no Wi-Fi connection for students but only for the principal and other staff. There are lab facilities available, and all equipment is provided. Classrooms and a very small library are available. And the library contains lots of books, which are provided for 15 days. The hostel feels so big, and its fee is INR 7k. The food is not good, and a mess is there, but medical facilities, sports, and games are not available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a worst college I have ever seen.
reviews.review_text: Very less facilities are available for the B pharmacy course in our college. There is no Wi-Fi facility but labs are well-maintained for practicals. Our classrooms are very small. The library is very helpful for studying. The food served in the hostel is not good. The hostel fee is Rs. 7,000 per month.

reviews.review_heading: It provides a good campus and a good education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is amazing. The classrooms and labs are well-maintained with good hygiene and comfort. It has all types of infrastructure required in labs, from well-equipped machinery to pure chemicals. The lab attendants and helpers support the students to a high level.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Al-Ameen College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: In our college, many facilities were available. The food served was good, and it provides safe water for drinking. Laboratories were good, and daily laboratories classes were conducted in our college. The library was provided with all types of books. Most important thing was that sports and games were available.

review_content.Placements: You can get an average salary of Rs. 1,00,000 per month during your PG. A medical officer can get a salary of Rs. 50,000 per month. This may differ according to your state.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides average facilities and infrastructure. The boys' hostel is one the best in entire Maharashtra. Separate restrooms are available in every room. review_summary.college_name: Rajiv Gandhi Medical College,Thane Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best course to study and have a happy life.

content.Placements: 100% placement is offered if you complete your MBBS degree from RAJIV GANDHI MEDICAL COLLEGE THANE. The package depends on students doing post-graduation after MBBS mostly. Packages depend on the hospital of choice, ranging from 70k to 200k Rs. The highest is in crores. 100% internships are offered. Top roles can be the owner of a multi-specialty hospital, head of a hospital, or head of the teaching faculty in various coaching institutes.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi connection in the library, and classrooms are well ventilated and have central AC with projectors for better demonstration of subjects in detail. Lab facilities are extraordinary; we have separate labs for each subject, like 19. They have all basic requirements in MBBS college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good education and training.

content.Placements: Each batch has 100 students. There is no tension regarding the package. Very good job opportunities are available with a 100% job guarantee. An internship is compulsory and must be done at Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Hospital. Both bachelor’s and master’s degrees are available. There is good interaction with all batchmates.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is nice but away from campus. Bus facilities are available. Library offers 24-hour service with Wi-Fi, and online learning facilities are also available there. All books are provided. Mess is not available, but college canteen is good, though it is not functional at the moment. The ground is small, but there is access to a nearby turf.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college has better hostels and average academics and infrastructure.

content.Placements: You can get an average salary of Rs. 1,00,000 per month during your PG. A medical officer can get a salary of Rs. 50,000 per month. This may differ according to your state.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides average facilities and infrastructure. The boys' hostel is one the best in entire Maharashtra. Separate restrooms are available in every room. There are two students per room. There are two beds and mattresses. Geysers for hot hot water are also present in the hostel.
content.Faculty: The curriculum and faculty members in almost all the medical colleges are quite similar. You have to focus on self-study. We have 2 informative exams, 1 prelims, and 1 university exam. Our faculty members are very helpful and approachable. They help us whenever needed.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I'm very satisfied with my college infrastructure because it has air conditioning.

content.Placements: To get admission into MBBS, one competitive exam is held, the NEET, which we have to qualify for. There are lacs of students who participate, and thousands get selected. Our batch strength is 80; we are currently studying; after 4.5 years, we get into an internship, where we get the salary.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very nice. The new building is in construction as there is no adequate space to cover UG, PG, and hospital at one site. Hospital and college are at the same place, which provides us with knowledge of theory and also practical.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a dream college of every medical student.

content.Placements: I am a student of the 2018 batch of RGMC and CSMH, Thane, studying MBBS 3rd year. Students after giving NEET exam, the eligibility criteria is above 580 marks in NEET, and based on the merit list, a college is allocated to students. After the final year, students get an internship.
content.Infrastructure: The college building is of 3 floors, of which the ground floor has a hospital. The first floor is for the hospital and academic section. The second floor is for physiology, anatomy, microbiology, FMT PSM pathology and pharmacology. A student council is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Best course to study and have a happy life.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi connection in the library, and classrooms are well ventilated and have central AC with projectors for better demonstration of subjects in detail. Lab facilities are extraordinary; we have separate labs for each subject, like 19. They have all basic requirements in MBBS college.

reviews.review_heading: Good education and training.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is nice but away from campus. Bus facilities are available. Library offers 24-hour service with Wi-Fi, and online learning facilities are also available there. All books are provided. Mess is not available, but college canteen is good, though it is not functional at the moment. The ground is small, but there is access to a nearby turf.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has better hostels and average academics and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides average facilities and infrastructure. The boys' hostel is one the best in entire Maharashtra. Separate restrooms are available in every room. There are two students per room. There are two beds and mattresses. Geysers for hot hot water are also present in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I'm very satisfied with my college infrastructure because it has air conditioning.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very nice. The new building is in construction as there is no adequate space to cover UG, PG, and hospital at one site. Hospital and college are at the same place, which provides us with knowledge of theory and also practical.

reviews.review_heading: It is a dream college of every medical student.
reviews.review_text: The college building is of 3 floors, of which the ground floor has a hospital. The first floor is for the hospital and academic section. The second floor is for physiology, anatomy, microbiology, FMT PSM pathology and pharmacology. A student council is also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best medical colleges in Maharashtra, which is run by Thane Municipal Corporation.
reviews.review_text: RGMC has a building in which there is a hospital infrastructure on the ground floor and 1st floor. A medical college is on the 2nd and 3rd floors. The campus and building are small as compared to other medical colleges. There is a facility of boys hostel, which is near to the college building. The girls' hostel is 3 km away from the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is situated in Thane region. Our college has the best library.
reviews.review_text: The girls' hostel is best, spacious and clean. It provides all facilities like drinking water, electricity and others. The girls' hostel has good security that they take care of any incident around the premises. There is a register for entry and exit timing of students.

reviews.review_heading: This is a great place to start from.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good, other than the fact that the college and hospitals are old. There are plenty of classrooms. The library is very good, and a 24X7 air-conditioner connection is provided. Hostels are also good with 24X7 security for girls. The girl's hostel is in khopat which is 2 km from the hospital and the boy's hostel is in the hospital building itself, both hostels are good in infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied as both the facilities teachers students were friendly and cooperative.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are well above average. The wall are highly made with brick and titles. The most importanting thing about this is the environment here. It is neat and clean. We have smart classes for extra classes laboratories and practices rooms for students and etc. The food quality was good and the medical facilities provided by the elders were sufficient and mainly. The sports are good. Following daily morning exercise.

reviews.review_heading: Our college management is bad in handling students issues.
reviews.review_text: There is a single big library and reading room with air-conditioners. There are proper labs for practical knowledge. Classrooms are average in infrastructure. Accommodation at the hostel for students from all over India and outside. A specific number of seats are available at the hostel. Canteen is in poor condition. Cage is present for playing box cricket and volleyball.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of SDM College of Ayurveda and Hospital, Bangalore.

content.Placements: 100 students are given seats per year at this college. The highest package is 6 LPA. The lowest package is Rs 90,000 per month. After B.A.M.S, you can do PG and become a specialist. You can also become an RMO or you can join the government or private hospital and work there.
content.Infrastructure: We have 3 departments like Samhita, Sidhanta, Rachana Sharira and Kriya Sharira. For anatomy and physiology, we have a separate lab. Cadaver is provided to students for proper understanding of the human body.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful and qualified with Ph.D. degrees. Their teaching qualities are somewhat lengthy. The course starts with 20 days of transition curriculum. After that, we have proper classes of 1.5 years. After that we have university exams.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review of SDM institute of ayurveda Bangalore .

content.Placements: As this is a medical college, there are no placements provided at this college. You need to crack some entrance exams to get into PG courses. It will depend on your practice; if you get selected for a government college after this, you can get around 80,000 per month. Internships are compulsory for all the students here. There is a 1-year compulsory internship programme.
content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms are well-equipped with projectors and smart boards will also be there in the future. Labs have all the instruments for study purposes. The library has almost every book there. Hostels are quite good and are well-furnished and hygienic. The food is also very good. The sports room is there in college.

individual_reviews.title: It's a good course. Teachers are really very good and helpful.

content.Placements: Actually, this course is not about placements; you can go for MD preparation, or you can also start your own clinic or hospital after getting this degree. You can earn as much as you want according to your clinical skills. Overall, this course is good. As of today, there are many people following Ayurveda.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-fi is not available on the whole campus. Classrooms are good. The library is also fine. You can get most of the books there. Hostels are well furnished, clean, and hygienic. Food quality is also fine. Badminton courts, gyms, and sports rooms are also available there.

content.Infrastructure: The course is well taught by professionals and the college have proper classrooms, projectors in every classroom, separate Labs for each Departments like Anatomy Lab, Physiology Lab etc. No Wi-Fi facility available for students other than in Library. Library is top notch.

individual_reviews.title: SDM College is the best college for those who need to fulfill their goals.

content.Placements: NEET rank below 85,000 get placement. Around Rs.2500 per month in an internship. Just a B.A.M.S. course certificate is enough to get eligible for joining any hospital. Can become a surgeon, physician, lecturer, research center, etc. Also can work in other clinics and can open a separate clinic.
content.Infrastructure: Nice infrastructure with well-structured labs and a classroom. Library with enough books. Labs with all the required instruments. Well-ventilated rooms, with proper hostel food facility and playground. There are badminton courts and television rooms, and volleyball, throwball, and football courts. There will be free Wi-Fi near the basements.
